Rematch é um jogo fantástico para quem ama futebol e gosta de jogar com amigos. A jogabilidade é envolvente e estratégica, capturando a essência do desporto-rei de uma forma brilhante.

É perfeito para sessões de jogo com amigos, promovendo diversão e camaradagem. As partidas são intensas e memoráveis.

Para os que procuram um desafio, Rematch oferece profundidade tática e adversários que exigem o teu melhor. Cada jogo é uma oportunidade para aperfeiçoar as tuas habilidades e estratégias, tornando-o viciante e gratificante.

Upon playing a few matches a day or two after the big update, I could already tell that the whole movement mechanic has been updated as well. Unfortunately, not in the good way. The main issue I came across with was the fact that goalkeeper's movement became so jammed it became almost unplayable (it was somewhat decent before, now upon using the extra effort your character doesn't even turn when moving the mouse, therefore I conclude that the main target of the update is mostly the console half.) The fact that there's almost no suggestion to play the tutorials makes it even harder to find reliable teammates during matches (you still have to open a specific tab if you ever want to learn a new skill). As for the comp matchmaking: it's still impossible to play when joining a stack of three or four with people having significant difference in skill and knowledge (a platinum person can still queue with a silver player and play, therefore creating an issue of smurfing and such)

Mécaniquement super intéressant même si avec le temps il faudra en rajouter , le sentiment d'arriver à faire ce qu'on avait en tête avec d'autres joueurs est hyper satisfaisant. Cependant au niveau de la gestion de la communauté il manque la capacité de punir les abus in-game.

Le jeu est truffé de bugs et il manque des fonctionnalités nécessaires d'un jeu en ligne comme les signalements. Les dev en branlent pas une, y a aucune amélioration en plusieurs mois. En plus de ça on joue contre contre et avec des abrutis qui lâchent pas la balle et qui se mettent tous en attaque tout le temps, ça fait pitié. 
Pour finir, c'est honteux de proposer uniquement le 5v5 en ranked.

Love the game, but ranked is absolutely unplayable and there are a bunch of other problems/bugs.
Sometimes you are just doomed to not be able to touch the ball (can only shoot/pass, not gain possession). Ball is lagging behind every now and then. Goalie hitbox seems to be a mess sometimes (animation to catch the ball starts, but you dont actually get it). If you are unlucky, the minimap shows player icons as the same color so you can only guess which one your team is.

Ranked is really bad. Balancing is basically non-existent. Sometimes you play with bronze in high plat (Its hell). If you get Mobin.IRAN in your game, run... MMR is not a thing +20/-20, take it or leave it... 
Everyone has an ego, lot of them cant play the game even slightly. Sometimes people dont want to be gk and just leave the goal empty. Its a problem.

If you play with friends however, it is a great game, which I would still recommend even with the bugs. But playing alone is not really fun until a certain point, I guess.

Du versucht denn Ball vom Gegner abzunehmen und Stellst ein Bein in seine Fresse, passiert nichts, aber so bald du denn Ball hast muss nur einer von der Ganz anderen Seite des Spielfelds auch nur niesen und du hast eine 3 Jahre lange Animation im gegensatz zu denn anderen.

Kurz gesagt:

Net Coding ist ARSCH, Hitboxen sind halbwegs ok, Animationen sind abnormal ARSCH, man läuft teilweise 5 mal um denn Ball anstatt denn Ball anzunehmen und der Gegner streift dich nur und hat denn ball.

Wenn ich 2 Schläge in die Fresse und eine Kack Community haben will, kann ich gleich COD spielen, weil du da zumindest für Geld Op Waffen kriegen kannst und da die Updates sogar noch was bringen.

Ansich Liebe ich das Spiel, aber auch nur wenn es mal Funktioniert, ohne aus dem Game geworfen zu werden, denn Ball nicht berühren zu können, nicht Animations Stuck zu sein und die Mates vlt. mal 20% ihres Gehirns nutzen.

O jogo é muito bom e realmente diverte. Ainda mais se for jogado com amigos!
Ele tem um enorme potencial para se tornar referência tanto no cenário casual quanto no competitivo, desde que seja bem administrado.
Atualmente, sinto que o jogo precisa com urgência de recursos como 3x3 e 4x4 nas filas ranqueadas e principalmente do crossplay, que fariam toda a diferença na experiência online. 
Esses adiamentos um após o outro para o lançamento do crossplay está quebrando a confiança da comunidade com a desenvolvedora, oque é péssimo para a saúde do game. 
Existem ainda alguns pontos que exigem atenção: a jogabilidade (que pode ser refinada), o meta (que precisa de equilíbrio constante) e alguns bugs que prejudicam a experiência.
Apesar de ser diferente de outros jogos de futebol e se destacar positivamente por isso, ele precisa se reinventar constantemente para manter a base de jogadores ativa. Isso pode ser feito com cosméticos realmente atrativos, modos de jogo variados, missões diárias/semanais/mensais, sistema de clubes e etc. Caso contrário, o jogo tende a perder muitos players ao longo do tempo e ter cada vez menos players novos chegando.

-

Atualização da análise:

O crossplay foi adicionado e é notável o impacto positivo no jogo.

Minha nota para o jogo atualmente é 8.5/10, mas com real potencial de ser um 10/10 caso os pontos citados sejam resolvidos.

フィールドの1人となって3v3～5v5でやるサッカーゲーム。
VC機能はあるが、野良でつけてる人はほぼ皆無かつ、「パスくれ」ぐらいしか指示出しがないため味方と共通イメージを描けるのは高ランクになってからだった。（低ランクでもたまにいる）
パス・シュートともにマニュアルエイムのため、感覚が慣れるまでは少し難しいかも。

現実のサッカーと同じく、シュートに至るまでの導線として空きスペースの活用がかなり重要。
そのため、ボールを持っていないときに適切な動きやポジショニングをできるかが勝率に直結する。
この辺はサッカー／フットサル経験者やその類の知識を持ってる人が圧倒的に有利な部分。

ちまたには様々なテクニックが存在しているが、そんなの無しでも基本操作の「ドリブル」「パス」「シュート」「トラップ」とポジショニングで十分戦える。
難しいテクニックよりも回りを常に見て、ダイレクトプレーやサイドチェンジ、タメを作って味方の走るタイミングに合わてパス等、ゲームコントロールする方が何倍も勝利に近づく。
ソロキューだと攻撃したがりの味方が多いので、守備寄りのポジショニングで失点を抑える戦い方をすると勝ちやすかった。

プレイヤー全員が同じ能力かつ派手な特殊技がない実直なゲーム性で自分は延々と出来るが、裏を返せば単調で退屈なゲームにもなりえるため、プレイ人口のジリ貧は時間の問題かと。
また、価格も少し高めのため新規は増えずらそう。
ゴールデンタイムなら即マッチする今のうちにプレイして楽しむことをお勧めする。

Not worth $30 and it breaks my heart that i feel like my money was wasted. Good luck Sloclap, gamers are hard to please when you piss em off.

At it's core, its a blast. When latency isn't dragging the experience down, the game is addictive and satisfying to execute shots on goal, passes, and evasive techniques. The moment-to-moment gameplay is even better with friends and fosters genuine camaraderie, and my best experiences have been through improvised plays with friends.

The community can be both inviting and toxic. Most times it's approachable, cooperative, and generally fun to share a lobby with. However there are other times where I wish there was a report button for the players who intentionally throw a match or decide to verbally tilt because their expectations weren't met. 

With that said, the technical underpinnings hold the game back from reaching it's competitive potential. The way packet updates are handled introduces enough inconsistency that I can't recommend this game as a serious competitive platform in it's current state. At times, ball priority feels inconsistent, which may be an intentional mechanic or simply another byproduct of the network layer, but either way, it can feel arbitrary in high-stakes moments.

Still, when taken less seriously, It shines. It's fast paced, quick matches, and endlessly replayable. It's best enjoyed with friends, drinks, and little emphasis on competition.

Antes de comenzar, recomiendo el juego si pero hay una cosa a tener en cuenta. Algunas partidas he tenido lag y se nota mucho sobretodo si eres portero, te jode la partida. Como esto me ha ocurrido pocas veces quiero pensar que quizás fue mi propia conexión o la de otro jugador.
Es un juego de fútbol muy arcade lo cual hace que sea entretenido y frenético. No hay faltas de ningún tipo, si te meten una patada te levantas y sigues, no hay fueras tampoco porque el campo esta rodeado como por paredes y el gol lo marca que la pelota no la tenga el portero en la mano, porque aunque este dentro si la tiene en la mano no es gol (esto es gracioso porque si intentan pasarla desde dentro es autogol).
Hay 3 modos de juego: 3v3, 4v4 y 5v5 siendo esta ultima la modalidad en el modo clasificatoria. Cada una tiene sus cualidades siendo 3v3 más rápido y se siente más como una partida rápida mientras que 5v5 es más como un partido con estrategias reales.
No tengo mucho más que añadir, hay cosméticos que se pueden comprar con dinero real o del juego, hay un pase de temporada gratuito y puedes también personalizar cosas como las celebraciones, las poses de victoria o los estadios.

Rematch is just great - it is simple and complex at the same time. You don't need virtually anything to start playing at a good level, but at the same time you can discover dozens of moves that will enrich your play, that you will be practicing for hours straight.

Server population - currently, this is the only major issue with the game in my opinion. You can't find a non-ranked game during working hours on weekdays. Still, ranked games are fine, and there are a lot of players at evenings and on weekends.

Net code is fine - with my ~1000 matches I encountered only minor issues that are present in any game with a pace that fast (like if you pressed a button simultaneously with you opponent, you should expect that it is a 50% chance that the server will take your side. Moreover, the game has a few features that make these situations neutral).

Community is decent - as it is a competitive game, you should expect some people being rude. However, this is a rare situation here (if you don't provoke them). You can also just turn off the voice chat. It is sad that they still haven't added a push to talk button though...

I never regretted purchasing Rematch, and I strongly recommend it to anyone who likes competitive gameplay.

The game is an absolute blast. It is most definitely more enjoyable with a group of friends you can actually communicate and learn with, than joining random games solo. There are certainly a few issues and quirks that can be frustrating, but its part of learning the game in my eyes. People seem to want to play this as if it were real life 11 v 11 football when the game simply is not that. Its goofy and has its own rules, logic and mechanisms. Learning these rather than what you expect should happen is what matters. Theres the occasional issue with rubberbanding, or lag, but these issues are far enough apart or minor enough in my experience to still play perfectly fine. Theres a definite learning curve to be truly excellent, but with a group of friends it is a very fun experience, and can be extremely satisfying to pull off team moves together

i was sooooooo looking forward to this game, and nothing killed the hype for me more than playing it. 

on paper you have a throwback to fifa street, but set up for competitive play using rocket league's online model. hell yea sounds great right?

well what if the feedback from the ball was atrocious? what if every pass felt like a casino roulette of who's gonna actually receive it? what if every goal had a lag that repositioned multiple players because no one is every synced up in this game? 

there's no finesse, no technique. you wont be doing aerial passes and goals like in rocket league, or anything even close.  you stand in a spot you think is good and mash inputs and hope your inputs lead the ball to you instead of the other team. dribbling is unrewarding and feels terrible. 

and it's a shame. it's a bunch of really good ideas than were executed poorly. reminds me of absolver unfortunately.

I really love the idea behind this game… BUT (bullet points in order of importance to me):

1) Passing Sensitivity - I’ve completely stopped using the 'pass' button. There’s literally a 50/50 chance of making the pass or losing the ball in the opposite direction. Why can’t I adjust the sensitivity while holding the lob or pass button? Right now it’s either I just tap the pass/lob button or I miss it completely. This needs to be fixed ASAP!

2) Blocking the shots - God, there’s no way to perfectly time and block shots. Even if I’m standing right on the shooting line, the ball sometimes just bypasses me. Jumping in defense? Pointless. All I can do is hit the pass button and pray my character happens to be close enough to reach the ball.

3) Animations/Net issues/NetCode - Honestly, this is just a piece of crap. You’ve got a free engine with a huge community and skilled professionals behind it, and somehow you’ve managed to make it as bad as possible.

4) Ranked/Competetive gameplay - Guys, make all game types available as ranked. Let the community decide what works best. Maybe in the future the pro scene will settle on which mode should count as the official ‘pro-scene’ format, but in the meantime give players the ability to have fun and grind 3v3 and 4v4.

5) In game content - Game cost me ~$25-30 and yet there;s literally zero in game content. The shop doesn’t rotate, daily missions don’t exist… there’s just no fun.

Fingers crossed for this project. For now though, I’m putting the game aside to collect some dust and waiting for some serious updates.

Like many reviews already point out, the game can be fun when people pass and try to play actual football, however the game has a lot of issues in it's core gameplay:

1) Air lobs are impossible to defend due to the high priority of bicycle kicks.
2) Tackle interactions can be quite frustrating when 2 players are going for a 50/50 because the player that touches the ball first gets tackled as soon as they touch the ball, creating stall mates where no one wants to get the ball first since they will loose the ball instantly while being stuck in a stuttering animation afterwards.
3) At certain points during the day it can be impossible to find matches (I've sat 15 minutes trying to find a game before giving up).
4) Goalkeepers can go from catching top corner shots to being unable to catch a ball that is clearly within reach.
5) This game is  $30 for an online only game, that has a battle pass where 90% of the cosmetics are locked behind. After playing over 150 matches I'm still at the beginning of the last section battle pass (I was never done with a section before the next section unlocked so none of my xp was wasted).

The price tag + battle passes and issues make it impossible to recommend to anyone and for an only only game that means that it will keep having an ever shrinking player base, and possible die due to not enough players.

I am a player who pre-ordered your game in the Pro Edition for €30. I am now disappointed with my purchase after several months of tryhard. However, I still keep high hopes of seeing the game I had imagined, and being able to enjoy it 100%, because for me it is the best competitor to FIFA, and we truly need a mechanical and original game like Rematch.

Here are some problems and reasons for my disappointment:

Your game is developed by a team using Unreal Engine 5, a free engine (up to a certain revenue without requiring a license) that provides a wide range of tools for animation, sound, maps, etc. This offers huge shortcuts in many aspects, compared to a team that would have to develop its own engine. Because of this, I expect your team to deliver much more, with the qualifications at hand.

Marketing and communication. From what I have seen, bug fixes and major issues—constantly repeated by the community since the very first betas—have only been heard but not resolved. Meanwhile, the first pieces of content released in the game were shop skins priced at €10, well before any meaningful updates.

Cheaters. The number of cheaters on the servers makes sessions unplayable, proving that your anti-cheat is ineffective. On top of this, there is no in-game reporting system. Instead, players are told by Sloclap to go on Discord, upload a video, and share the cheater’s Steam profile link. But is it really up to the community to moderate the game? Am I supposed to spend my time reporting 10 players per day and recording every session?

Lack of competitive commitment and poor matchmaking.
Rematch is a football game, and football is a competitive sport. Yet, I feel the game lacks proper dribbling mechanics (only two options: sombrero or directional dribble with a double input). All the other dribbles were not designed by developers but discovered by the community itself (golden boost, ipy slide, blade shot, etc.). There is also no way to create “clubs” to play with friends against other teams, no tournament system with points, skins, or titles as rewards. On top of that, the matchmaking is very unbalanced, combined with an in-game meta that ruins the fun whenever one team sticks to it without changing its playstyle.

A lack of content.
Simply put: you launch Rematch, and you can only play matches. That’s it. There are no additional or fun game modes (and I actually have plenty of ideas if needed). The shop is starting to fill up, but it’s still nowhere near enough.

Conclusion.
In conclusion, the game has real potential, but I believe the hype from the first betas went to the heads of some people in your team, pushing you to release the game earlier than planned just to profit from that hype and from a genuinely interested community. Unfortunately, this resulted in disappointment due to the choices made after launch, and the game is now critically lacking in content.

An action-packed soccer game with lots of potential. Quick matches (3v3, 4v4, 5v5) and 5v5 ranked. You can customize your character. You can unlock or purchase various skins, e.g., game arenas, celebration animations, or profile content. The matchmaking in ranked mode could be improved, as in practice it throws players from all divisions into one selection pool. This leads to uneven match experiences.

Practically the game struggles with lag, the ball is glitching. There is a high chance that you will get a bug for the rest of the game so you can't interact with the ball at all! Ball contact is inconsistent. Attacks sometimes don't connect with the opponent to take the ball away from them. Balls often fly through the body instead of making contact (despite the correct buttons being pressed).

I find it very strange that in a PvP game, it is not foreseeable that there could be disruptive behavior. PvP games have been around for a long time. So, as an interested modern developer, you should be able to draw on decades of market experience and introduce a system right from the start. For the time being, it would be advisable to only play as a full team in order to avoid trolls and frustrated players.

It would be helpful to invest the working hours for the above-mentioned basic game mechanics in order to improve them in a timely manner.

Nevertheless, I wish this game every success, because it's really fun to play with friends on a cozy evening.

TL:DR > The game can be fun 30% of the time, if you have 2-4 friends who are chill about it being laggy and rubberbandy — and don't mind losing because of the bad netcode.

I am not sure how they manage to make the game worse and worse with every update — but as the game progresses it is worse every time. For every bug they fix the game lags, stutters and rubberbands more.

It was alright when it released and as the season 0 progresses it is getting worse and worse. Sometimes you might catch the ball as the goalkeeper only for it to be in the net next moment because of bad net code; or a empty space will shot at the goal — only once was it this bad — but still...

It feels like it is still in a Beta state, everything is there and when it works — which is like 30% of the time — it works really nicely. If you have 2-4 friends who are also going to buy a game and you don't stress about glitches and rubberbanding you will have a blast. I certanly do, but I can get 2-4 friends who are chill when game doesn't work and we lose because of bad netcode.

Otherwise it took me about 40 hours of play to get to level 60 and I haven't completed page 2 of 3 for battle pass. So it is grindy as hell and not in a good way. So I hate that too. You have to buy the battle pass to get all the rewards, which is very battlepassy, but I don't think they have made the battlepass really aproachable as many people will not buy it if they need 80-100 hours per Season to sink in.

Also the timers are just awful if you are alone waiting for a match, if you try to start a 4v4 solo you can wait for 30+ minutes.

Matchmaking is also awful. Your team when you start solo will often be comprised of other solo players and you would also often run into a full team on the other side. Solo players will often troll when they take 2 goals or more and give your team auto goals — which ruins the fun. Many will just leave the game if they start losing 2–0 and there is nothing you can do about that — you are at the mercy of matchmaking to add a random after a few seconds or minutes. There is also no way to report this and no penalty for doing it.

So don't get the game just yet, if you don't have friends to play it with it is not worth it. To be honest it would not be worth it to play it even if it was free due to the frustration it causes because of the bad netcode.

Unfortunately, this game is heading towards its end, and it’s becoming more obvious with each update. The developers haven’t added anything new to the in-game store for a long time, and from the promised patches we’ve received almost nothing. Even worse, after the last two so-called “mini-updates,” the game is in a worse state than before – full of bugs and with declining technical quality.

On the pitch, the gameplay has completely lost its sense – players pass inaccurately, dribbling and crossing look terrible. Every cross almost always results in an advantage for the attackers, while defensive headers are practically nonexistent. The player holding the ball is slower than those without it, making the whole match feel more like hot potato than football.

Instead of fixing real problems, the devs decided to mess with mechanics that were actually working fine. On top of that, there’s a clear lack of support – no new items, no ideas, no motivation.

I’m afraid that after the second promised season, the game will simply die a natural death. That’s why I do not recommend buying it – better wait for something that will actually be developed and improved.

Le jeu est vide et il manque le facteur "spectacle". J'ai l'impression que les développeurs ont oublié qu'un jeu est censé être fun avant toute chose. Là, j'ai l'impression d'avoir affaire à un jeu bâclé. Mise à part le gameplay, qui est assez bon, le jeu est vide et on en fait donc vite le tour.

Vous allez me dire que c'est un jeu de foot et que Rocket League est similaire. Je vous dirais certes, RL a ce défaut, mais il ne faut pas oublier que RL a aussi un gameplay dix fois supérieur où tout est MANUEL. Tu peux donc voir trois flip reset dans un match, ce qui ajoute énormément au facteur fun.

Rematch, de ce côté, se rapproche beaucoup plus d’un Roller Champions que de RL, ce qui n'est pas bon signe.

По ощущениям, как будто бы с каждым днём, каждым обновлением, сетевая составляющая игры работает всё хуже и хуже. То мяч выбивают у тебя из рук, когда ты голкипер (хотя у тебя полоска твоего мяча еще на половине и мяч ты брал от соперника, а не от своего тиммейта), то мяч проходит сквозь тебя, то отбор не работает, хотя визуально ты отбираешь. Перехват тоже неработает, бывают случаи, когда мяч ты отбил телом, получил очки за перехват, а мяч не поменял траекторию и остался у соперника в ногах. А про телепорты мяча и прочее, и прочее, я молчу. Про такие вещи можно писать еще много, но оно происходит в каждом матче. Абсолютно в каждом. И из-за этого играть нет никакого желания, хотя сама игра очень кайфовая. Играть то хочется, но все эти ошибки игры, не твои, а именно игры - отбивают всякое желание играть. Наверное этим и объясняется такой низкий онлайн, который раньше был не меньше 10к-15к на постоянной основе, что нормально. А сейчас можно в прайм тайм найти 6к-9к примерно. Для поиска игры этого хватает, но часто приходится играть с теми же игроками.

Конечный вердикт такой: Игра классная, может доставить немало положительных эмоций, но вот нэткод, баги и все прочие проблемы с игрой вызывают жжение пятой точки и отбивают желание играть в это. Venderam um jogo incompleto (e muito longe do aceitável) por um preço injustificável. Pouca coisa mudou dos play tests nas betas até aqui, e os erros e problemas mais críticos continuaram, se não chegaram a piorar. Os servidores e o netcode são tenebrosos, e independente do seu ping e conexão com internet, com certeza vão afetar suas partidas muito frequentemente. Bugs e exploits que afetam negativamente o jogo e que foram identificados desde o primeiro play test ainda permanecem - e ao que tudo indica, parece que vieram pra ficar. O sistema de prioridade da bola depende se a moeda que os devs jogam na hora vai cair em cara ou coroa, e se não bastassem todos os bugs e a falta de crossplay (que virou uma eterna promessa), não existe nenhum sistema de punição no jogo pra quem trolla, dá quit ou é tóxico - e você vai encontrar essa galerinha o tempo todo, já que o jogo parece até incentivar essas práticas com a ausência de pulso firme. Você não consegue mutar players individualmente, te forçando a muitas vezes jogar no all mute e perdendo um pouco do que seria um diferencial muito bacana nesse estilo de jogo, a comunicação e a tática em grupo. Como se não bastasse tudo isso, ainda existem os hackers que vão estragar seu jogo e dificilmente vão ser punidos, já que as denúncias são feitas via DISCORD.
Enfim, no início o jogo era bastante divertido, ainda mais jogando com amigos, mas todos esses fatores somados à falta de diversidade de modos e jogabilidade reforçam um despreparo muito grande, quase um descaso, na condução desse jogo. Gostaria muito que os principais problemas fossem corrigidos, mas até o momento parece um cenário muito irreal

Помойка состоящая из фанатиков блю лока и неадекватов, которые ливают и бьют в свои ворота при первой возможности. Системы репортов и наказаний нет, и, я так понимаю, не будет, разработчикам плевать. Если вы думаете, что проблемы есть только со стороны комьюнити, ох это далеко не так. Помойные сервера со скачущим пингом, ломаные анимки тоже часть этой игры. За вратаря у вас может пройти анимация того, что мяч вы словили, и у вас он даже отобразится в руках, но по итогу этот "шедевральный" движок все равно засчитает вам попадание. Приняли мяч? А хер там, противник с ломанной анимацией отобрал его у вас (Хотя у вас анимка сработала в разы раньше). Я уже не говорю про баги и абьюзы системы, которыми активно пользуются игроки, а разрабы как будто специально их игнорируют, зато понадабавляли платного контента побольше в и так не бесплатную игру. Еще 1 интересный факт, тут нельзя включать микрофон по кнопке, поэтому либо играйте с включенным 24/7, либо полностью вырубайте чат :D.

Наиграл в игру с релиза, был потрясён геймплеем, сам по себе футбол я не люблю, я не играл ни в одну из Fifa (х*й пойми какая часть), и что могу сказать по поводу игры:

Хочу наверное больше поговорить о минусах игры... Какой же ужасный netcode у игры, ну реально, в чём проблема исправить это первым делом? Я не могу понять, почему разрабы больше всего отдают предпочтение магазину и если быть честным, скины в магазине полный калл, не одна вещь не зацепила, люди которые их покупают земля вам кошельком.

Повторное видео после гола моё почтение, что происходит на экране это такая картина, не, ну реально анимации ломаются. Ну вот допустим, ты увидел как тип забил красивый гол, хочешь понять какие телодвижения он делал, а х*р тебе, ты не увидишь, тебе либо покажут чёрный экран, а иногда вообще каким-то боком повтор может даже не показаться и нет, это не связанно с тем, что игроки быстро пропускают, он просто не захочет показываться, пару минут полагает и после этого матч начнётся.

Самое бесячее из за чего я дропнул игру и стал её ненавидеть. Я играю с ПК, хочу дать нормальный пас, всё, экран, мышка, всё это направлена на тимейта. ХАХАХХАХАХХА, но игра так не думает, мяч улетит в другую сторону, вы хотели геймплея? хотите кайфа от игры? Вы его не получите. Боже как же меня рвало с этих моментов когда мяч просто улетает не туда.

Да я может не профессионал в этой игре, но по сравнению с рокет лигой той же самой, у которых минусов тоже не меньше, по логике по жанру та же игра, просто на машинах, с геймплеем где netcode на много сложнее и физика мяча куда сложнее. В rematch... что геймплей, что физика, убивают весь кайф от игры. Был ещё момент, когда мяч ко мне летит, рядом со мной тип стоит из вражеской команды, я подпрыгиваю первый, чтобы отбить мяч от ворот в другую сторону, но опять же игра так не думает, мяч окажется у противника и он забивает головой гол, хотя, было видно как я первый совершил все действия.

Ой не знаю ребят, кто хвалит эту игру, вы либо слепые, либо вам нравиться жрать дерьмо и скинами обмазываться.

Ну плюсы: графика, опять же дворовой геймплей радует, красивые анимации (первое время так думаешь), всё это выглядит натурально, но только первое время, потом тебя просто заколебёт это всё.

Минусов очень много, не смотрите на красивые коментарии от тех кто хвалит игру, сама игра в красивой обёртке, но с начинкой из г**на, я был рад игре и хочу, чтобы она развивалась и я надеюсь разрабы одумаются и сделают игру лучше, ну а я буду ждать тех времён.

Хочу сказать, что это моё сугубо личное мнение и я как покупатель который купил игру, отдал для такой игры которая не стоит своих денег, довольно не плохую сумму. Тем кому не нравиться мой отзыв, отзыв других типов, на всех вас мне по**ать. Жрите калл и дальше.
А те люди, которые здравомыслящие и понимают, вы красавчики. 

Надеюсь мой отзыв будет полезен для тех, кто ещё не купил игру, я может ещё в дальнейшем напишу если будут изменения в лучшую сторону и надеюсь мой следующий отзыв будет уже больше о плюсах игры.
Dogwater servers running intel pentium processors with 16 megabytes of ram on a dial-up connection.

*Note: As of August 2025, there are still some netcode issues that can significantly negatively affect the multiplayer experience. These issues are especially apparent when trying to defend or play goalie. What you see is not necessarily what the opposing player sees, which makes predicting/reacting to their actions much more difficult. This could also be playing into my points about imprecision in the controls.


[u]Overview[/u]: [b]Tekkers!/10[/b]
Sloclap put a lot of thought and effort into Rematch to make it an experience that, while simple on the surface, provides meaningful systems for skill expression. Working with your teammates to outplay the opposing team feels rewarding and makes the experience extremely replayable. Unfortunately, it feels like sometimes Rematch gets in its own way, preventing the experience from being as great as it could be. Rematch for me, though, has still been a great time, and there is a ton of potential in this gameplay loop.

[u]Primary Issues[/u]:
The thing I take the most issue with in Rematch is the imprecise controls/animations. When I say imprecise, I mean things like the depth of a pass can feel very ambiguous, and at times, the angle can feel off. I have a decent amount of hours with he game, and at this point it could be that I am just not very good at controlling the pass system, but it seems like a lot of other players also struggle with this [i](when they actually try to pass anyway)[/i]. This imprecision also extends to the goalkeeping experience. When trying to defend the goal (it feels like), at times, directional inputs are dropped. In other cases, you may react to a shot with the most reasonable directional input only to receive an animation that is only effective in specific situations. These imprecise animations allow players to outmaneuver you in situations that they really shouldn’t be able to. It is hard to describe this phenomenon without visual examples, but if you play, there will likely be a time when you experience it firsthand.

[u]My Takeaways[/u]:
I don’t think these issues should necessarily turn away players genuinely interested in the game. Rematch has been very fun to play, but with my dozens of hours, I think it is important to point out where Sloclap could improve. I also believe players should be aware of issues that could significantly affect their experience (depending on one’s tolerance for jank). Honestly, the fun I have had playing Rematch completely outweighs any of my frustrations with the game’s design. The game is effectively able to capture the hype (and frustration) of playing on a sports team. Collaboration is necessary, and the feeling of succeeding as a team is what [b]makes[/b] the experience for me. The gameplay itself is very fun, and only becomes more enjoyable as I gain experience and improve my control over the mechanics. I genuinely believe that with some good patching, the issues I mentioned could become much less significant or outright disappear.

Great game at its core, however dodgy matchmaking and hitbox issues plague the game. Im not the best player, Im in silver currently and at low pop times it usually takes about 20-30 mins to find a match.

Honestly this game was so fun to play when it was in the betas, but once it came around to being fully released it made me realize that I don't wanna play it anymore all the hype for literally nothing. I can't even play anymore because I have to wait for ridiculous queue times and ontop of that play with people who don't pass. (Maybe im coping but I don't think this game will go very far.)

Drop the Price,

aktuell kann ich dieses Spiel niemanden weiter empfehlen. Als ich mir das Spiel für 20€ gekauft habe dachte ich mir schon das es ein wenig zu teuer ist für ein Spiel welches in meinen Augen "unfertig" Released wurde. Aber das Sie jetzt 25€ dafür verlangen ist heftig.

Zu den positiven Punkten:
- Das Spiel macht Spaß da die Umsetzung in Ordnung ist, hat aber noch viel Luft nach oben. (was genau kommt bei den negativen Gründen}
- Mit Freunden ist es auch eine echt Spaßige Erfahrung, da man sich auf diese verlassen kann und schnell sich in Ranked hochspielen kann.
- Die Match Dauer von 6min ist auch gut gelöst, nicht zu viel nicht zu kurz. 

Zu den negativen Punkten:
- Das schlechteste Ranked System was es gibt. Man wird mit jeden Rang in einem Team geschmissen, egal ob Bronze oder Elite. Macht Null Sinn ist aber so, da kann man direkt Unrated Spielen es macht wirklich keinen Unterschied. (Wenn man alleine spielt gibt es keine Hoffnung nach oben zu kommen, hat man aber paar Freunde kann man alles reißen auch mit wenig Game Knowlege)
- Solo Queue unmöglich, weder in Unrated noch in Ranked. Im Rangsystem muss was passieren man kann doch keine Anfänger in einen Team schmeißen mit Erfahrenen Spielern was ist da los? Das ist so als würde ich einen 1. Klässler aus der Grundschule ins Gymnasium zum Abitur packen der jetzt eine Facharbeit schreiben soll.
- Toxische Mates, da ist die Community ein wenig selber Schuld. (Frust aber verständlich bei dem Spiel)
- Server Probleme
- Spielabstürze, bei meinen Freunden war das Problem häufig. Seitdem neusten Patch aber nicht mehr. (Bei mir komischer Weise kam beim neuen Update mein erster Game Crash)
- Es gibt keine Clan/Club Funktion, würde dem Spiel mehr Spice geben meiner Meinung nach.
- Wie am Anfang gesagt kein gerechter Preis für ein Released Game.

Abschließende Worte
Ich würde das Spiel gerne für neue Spieler empfehlen dafür muss aber noch einiges gemacht werden, die Punkte sind mir auch nur spontan eingefallen vielleicht bearbeite ich die Rezession noch einmal.

Desde la ultima actualización el rendimiento del juego mejoró, si urgentemente el sistema de recompensa del competitivo no cambia el juego va a morir. Tiene que cambiar URGENTE: ser el MVP del partido y por perder te quiten dicho titulo y no tengas ninguna recompensa por ello, por mas que seas quien mas obtuvo puntos en todo el partido, es injusto que te quiten los mismos puntos que al resto del equipo. La solución que propongo es que la puntuación de elo sea positiva (en el caso de ganar) en función al puntaje que se obtuvo en el partido, ej: si tu puntuación final en el partido fue de 1200 puntos, de elo se te acreditan esos 1200 puntos. en el caso de perder sea a la inversa, quien obtuvo mayor puntuación es a quien menos se le restan puntos, para tener una mayor meritocracia. 

En segundo lugar, para un mejor gameplay e incentivar al juego en equipo se debería aumentar los puntos de asistencia. cuando se efectúa una asistencia, al jugador se le otorga una puntuación de "pase" + "Asistencia" que la suma de las dos no llega a la misma cantidad de puntos que se le otorgan a quien hace el gol. En caso de generar una misma cantidad de puntos para los dos jugadores involucrados en dicho gol, se podría mejorar el trabajo en equipo de los jugadores evitando la ambición de hacer el gol y no pasarle la pelota a nadie, que es el error mas recurrente en el juego, personas que cruzan el estadio entero solo para tirar al arco y perder la pelota.

Si esos pintos básicos no son cambiados no adelanta añadir cosméticos de marcas ni actualizar el pase de batalla, el juego va a seguir muriendo porque la gente se cansa.

El juego me encanta, pero me canso y me aburro al jugar 3 partidos por culpa de lo mencionado anteriormente, por eso no se lo recomiendo a nadie.

Понимаю, что писать обзор на игру, вышедшую 2 месяца назад, при этом оставляю такой отзыв не очень правильно, однако, спешу поделиться своим обзором на такую игру как REMATCH.

Что касается скинов, то здесь всё круто, кол-во обновок, которые ты можешь купить и носить явно добавляют этой игре плюс касательно кастомизации. Однако в совокупности с определёнными проблемами этой игры, остаётся странным, что к примеру определённую часть от этого могли бы пустить не на шмот для персов, а на фиксы багов имхо (In My Honest Opinion). 

Буду честен, игра имеет большой потанцевал, как сейчас говорят), однако ряд причин оставляют желать лучшего: из-за пинга наверное, когда 2 игрока стоят рядом, и они оба захотят принять мяч, сервер сочтёт выбрать точно не вас, а противника, таковы реалии... Также часто происходит так, что на экране на буквально миллисекунды ты принял мяч (играя к примеру за воротчика), а позже оказывается, что противник взял мяч первый и уже забивает тебе гол, а также бьёт по твоей морально-волевой, ведь ты всё, у себя в голове, вымерил. Следует уточнить, что это связанно не только с вратарём, такие "приколы" происходят не исходя из твоего места на поле, для более ясного понимания я могу привести в пример игру CS 2. Как там и что, я думаю вы хоть чуть понимаете, даже если нет, то наверняка видели тик токи или reels, не важно, на экране ты убил вражину (Может быть даже парочку раз), а он будто Иисус: восстал из мёртвых, также и в этой игре только с мячом, странно согласитесь?

Очень обидно, когда ты потел: давал хорошие пасы, старался, играл. Как вдруг при розыгрыше мяча, противник отдаёт пас далеко в сторону наших ворот, и человек делает одно точное нажатие и "чудом" забивает вам гол буквально за считанные секунды. В такие моменты становится очень и очень обидно.

Также хочется надеяться на добавление системы репортов, так как в любой соревновательной игре есть люди, которые плохо понимают, что эта игра далеко не про соло геймплей, навыки для которой у него определённо изучены за буквально 30-40 мин из тик тока по этой игре. Или же, к примеру, мы проигрываем при счёте 3:0 и остаётся минуты 3 - 2:30, за которое достаточно реально догнать, а то и забить больше голов, чем твой соперник, наш союзник попросту ливает (покидает игру) оставляя нас с меньшими шансами на победу, очевидно, что ему не хватило терпения, однако это не значит, что мы должны страдать играя в 4 против 5 человек. Даже если он ливнет, максимум что ему будет, так это в случае нашего проигрыша (4 против 5) ему просто снимут очки рейтинга и на этом всё. Честно, не думаю, что к примеру система "порядочности" как в игре DOTA 2 применима к этой игре, однако, я надеюсь, что в скором времени данную или же похожую функцию стоит ожидать в этой игре. 

В заключении хочется добавить, что это далеко не финальный мой отзыв касательно данной игры, в случае если что-то, да изменится в хорошую сторону, то я буду очень и очень рад.

O jogo possui uma proposta bem interessante, mas, infelizmente, a execução e o suporte constante são muito ruins. Por isso, eu não posso recomendar a sua compra na forma atual. 

Os grandes problemas são: 

Abandono dos desenvolvedores: A falta de atualizações e correções de bugs resultou em um ambiente que é constantemente explorado pelos jogadores, o que empecilha muito a jogabilidade. 

Comunidade tóxica e falta de moderação: Jogadores tóxicos são uma realidade aqui, e o sistema de denúncias é totalmente irrelevante. A denúncia precisa de um vídeo provando o que aconteceu, e depois o jogador ainda precisa ir até o Discord do jogo e seguir um procedimento complicado, tornando a moderação da comunidade praticamente inexistente. 

Em resumo, uma boa ideia que foi destruída pela falta de manutenção e ferramentas adequadas para garantir um ambiente saudável para jogar.

Edit: Eles colocaram o sistema de denúncia no jogo, mas ainda tá um lixo

Liebe Gemeinde,
wir haben uns heute hier versammelt um ein neues Spiel zu bewerten, es ist mal wieder soweit.
Es handelt sich dabei um das Spiel Rematch oder auch "Warum PASSST DU NICHT MAN!11!!!1!" aus dem Hause Sloclap.

[b]Doch was ist eigentlich Rematch?[/b]
Rematch ist ein Hure.. ähh ich meinte ein Spiel bei welchem ihr in 3v3, 4v4 oder auch 5v5 antretet und dabei einfach Fußball spielt, einfach nicen dreckigen Hallenfußball diggi.

Dabei steuert ihr eine Figur und könnt durch Skills statt Pay 2 Win überzeugen, oder auch nicht.
Dabei ist der letzte Mann im Strafraum immer der Torwart und kann durchaus mit Paraden glänzen, oder auch nicht.
Man könnte kann und sollte das Game also mit Rocket League vergleichen nur ohne die nervigen Airjumps und das rumgefliege.

Ähnlich sieht es auch bei der Community aus, diese besteht aus naja vorrangig Menschen welche aber entweder ihr Mic offener haben als Menschen in einer Polygamen Beziehung oder einfach vergessen haben das man auch in diesem Spiel passen kann und denken Sie wären Christiano (Spoiler das bin ich schon) und sich dann am nächst besten Gegenspieler festdribbeln.
Schlimmer wird es dann in Ranked, wenn die Egos auf noch größere Egos treffen bei einem generellen Chaos und fehlender Zuordnung da man Ranked nur 5v5 spielen kann. Spaß und Freude vorprogrammiert.

Dennoch macht das Game mit laufender Spielzeit immer mehr spaß, da man eigentlich wenn man nicht komplett auf den Kopf gefallen ist relativ schnell in die Mechaniken reinkommt und diese dann auch nach und nach Meistern kann.
Ansonsten erspielt man sich Ingame Währung, sowie EXP für Münzen für (Wie sollte es auch anders sein ^^) den Saison Pass zum freischalten der Gegenstände in diesem.
Mit den ganzen Items, kann man seinen Spieler anpassen, oder man kauft sich im Shop direkt einen der 3 Cash Skins (Ronaldinho, Ter Stegen, Mainoo) für den Maximum Drip.

[b]Kommen wir nun zu den Pros uns Cons:[/b]

[h2]Pros:[/h2]
- Geil für Premades/Teams (3v3 und Co mit Freunden, Kollegen, Müttern, etc.)
- Skill basiertes Game (Easy to learn, hard to master)
- Steam Achievements (Lets ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ Go!)
- Ronaldinho Skin (Here We Go)
- Wenn Server laufen flüssige Skillmoves
- Solides Matchmaking (Schnell)

[h2]Cons:[/h2]
- Im Solo weniger spaßig
- Server und Latenz (Besonders zu Release 1/10)
- Skil basiertes Game
- Verbuggte oder Teilweise Delayed bekommende Steam Achievements
- Manchmal Seltsame Animationen, denke mal Server bedingt
- Das Ranked System (5v5 und wirklich ein Haufen scheiße)


[h2]Fazit:[/h2]

Rematch kann, hat und sollte unglaubliches Potential haben. 
Warum? Hear me out, dann wisst ihr es, dazu muss ich etwas ausholen.
Schließlich stößt Rematch in einen Markt bei dem das Game kaum Konkurrenz hat bzw. eigentlich es nur einen Platzhirsch gibt.
Mittlerweile ist Rocket League gefühlt bei den Kids nicht mehr soooo krass im Hype (Meine Meinung, oder habt ihr mal einen der Kiddie heutzutage noch von Rocket League reden hören?) und es gibt so ein ähnliches Gameplay eigentlich nur bei den EA FC Teilen wenn man dort Pro Clubs spielt wo ebend jeder einen Pro/Spieler steuert.
Plottwist, es spielen nicht so unglaublich viele Leute den Modus Pro Clubs, ja es gibt sie aber dennoch spielt die Hauptzahl der EA FC Suchties (Zu denen ich auch zähle, sorry) Ultimate Team.
Es kommt auch nicht von ungefähr das Rematch zu Release über 90k Spieler hatte in den ersten Tagen, Quelle Steamdb oder macht halt euren eigenen Research.

Sollte also Rematch es schaffen ihre Server in den Griff zu kriegen und die teilweise ruckligen Animationen zu fixen hat man ein solides Game für ein paar Chillige Runden mit den Mates, Couch Gameplay etc.
Oder man schwitzt halt in Ranked aber das Rankedsystem ist uff, nennen wir es mal unbelohnend und schmerzhaft.

Hinzu kommt noch die Möglichkeit das Game zu erweitern, wie wäre es mit witzigen Modis wie bei Rocket League?
ZB. Wandschießen, oder Fußball Tennis wo man den Ball hoch spielen muss, oder ein 4 Felder Tennis wo man Battle Royale Mäßig ausscheidet wenn man den Ball nicht aus seinem Feld per One Touch rausspielt? (Glaube so einen Modus gabs mal bei EA FC in ich glaube Volta?), oder ein Hockey Modus in Rematch, oder ein Basketballmodus.
Wie ihr seht die Möglichkeiten sind da und ich denke das aus dem Game auch was werden kann.

Auch in Bezug auf Monetarisierung (Ahh Das Zauberwort welches jeder Gamer liebt) mehr Lizenzspieler als kaufbare oder sogar erspielbare Skins wären gut, oder mal ein paar Bälle Skins, Anpassung der Linien oder der Tore ähnlich wie bei EA FC, das Potential das Game auszuschlachten ist dabei genauso gegeben wie Grenzenlos.

Ebenso wäre auch eine richtige Esports Adaption möglich, stellt euch mal die ESports Teams von Wolfsburg, Bayern und co vor wie sie dann einfach virtuell in Rematch um die deutsche Rematch Meisterschaft spielen, alles durchaus Möglich. Oder einfach Cups welche Ingame gespielt werden, Qualifier und die dicken Turniere wo die besten Teams Echtgeldpreise gewinnen.
(Turniere gibt es scheinbar schon in Rematch, das habt ich durch fleißiges Googlen herausgefunden ^^)
Aber dafür müssen die Entwickler nun klotzen und liefern, das Game braucht nun demnächst gute Patches.

Kann ich das Spiel empfehlen? 
Ja verdammt.

Solltet ihr es euch kaufen wenn ihr ein dünnes Nervenkostüm habt?
Nö, aber kaufs dir und git gud.

Kurz um, wenn ihr das Game für nen guten Kurs bekommt (Max 20€) und bock habt auf ein bisschen skillen und Fußball, gönnt euch.

Indem Sinne.

The game has great potential, but until it lives up to some of it, I simply can't recommend it. Especially not at 30$.
Long story short, the netcode is BAD. The lag compensation teleports players and the ball around frequently. Tackles will make a sound as though you hit the ball, give you points for an interception, and the ball will never leave the opponents feet. Replays break commonly, and rarely look like what ANY of the players saw in game. Making this game (Which, sorry, looks pretty bad) in unreal engine 5 was a highly questionable decision, as it means it both looks and runs poorly. The ball can disappear for several seconds at a time, players can simply not render in, and if you have particularly bad luck, you may find yourself loading into a game when you cannot interact with the ball in any way other than shooting it. (auto-loss, no known fix even though it has been in the game since launch at least) There is no punishment for leaving, so people often ragequit at the first goal, and backfilling will frequently fail entirely and never fill the open spot.

Beyond all the issues with functionality, the meta especially in 3s and 4s sees around half of your games end as soon as one team scores a goal. Whatever team is in the lead can simply hold the ball in their half of the field, where they will always have an extra player who will be open. (Unless the defending goalkeeper comes out, in which case they just score for free) No, I am not describing ranked where there is something on the line. This is how a majority of games go in casual.

Edit, game saw my review and decided to show me some more BS that can happen:
Bloom effects get turned up to 10,000 on joining match, far too bright to even be able to track the ball reliably.
If your ping spikes even a bit, there is a pretty high chance the ball will ignore you entirely, phasing through you like you are a ghost.
If you slide at a player with the ball in the corner, you can both get stuck inside of each other, unable to move until the game spits you out 10 seconds later.


Plenty of other stuff I didn't mention, but these are the biggest things. I really hope it gets fixed, because I do like the game when it works. It just doesn't well over half the time.

Rematch game – I bought it right after the Beta tests. At first, it felt like it had potential, but the charm quickly faded.

It’s hard to find positives here. The negatives, however, are easy to spot – starting from controls to servers. Here’s a short list of flaws that frustrate the player and give the impression that you’re losing because of the game itself (and that’s one step toward the game’s downfall):

Controls – On a controller, turning and shooting feel clunky; on keyboard and mouse, passing and reading directions are so sensitive and delayed that it’s hard to make quick plays (you think you’ve already set the direction and released the pass, but suddenly it shifts…).

Teleporting ball and enemy player models – It’s terrible when you can’t predict what will happen, total randomness.

Ball possession – You can be closer to the ball, but the one who clicked faster will win it anyway – this reduces the importance of intelligent gameplay.

Servers – The issue isn’t having 50–70 ping, but that during a match ping can jump from 40 to even 120, making the game unplayable.

Rewards – The free rewards are so pathetic that there’s no point in unlocking them at all.

Goalkeeper animations – The game decides what’s “best,” but it’s often not the best option. What’s most annoying is when you move in defensive stance (CTRL) and instead of shifting slightly, the character makes a random bigger leap, making it hard to position for defense.

I could go on, but unfortunately, in my opinion, the game right now is barely playable. If I could turn back time, I wouldn’t buy it.

Это просто ужасная игра, в которой не работает ровным счетом ничего, игра вышла уже 3 месяца назад, в ней до сих пор не исправили неткод, рейтинг в игре до сих пор просто существует просто для галочки и не влияет ни на что, многие игроки просто покидают рейтинговые матчи во время игры и игра их за это никак не наказывает. Иногда во время игры игрок может превратиться в призрака, который будет бегать всю игру и ничего не делать, так как мяч не будет никак на вас реагировать. Ни одна кнопка работать не будет и перезаход вам не поможет. По мимо кучи багов в самой игре, она вызывает краш моей системы, раньше она крашила мой windows пока я играю в нее, но после последних обновлений она начала крашить систему после выключения игры. Также в игре очень много игровых фриков, практически в каждом матче вы найдете такого у себя в команде.

Я надеялся, что игра станет моей сессионкой, а превратилась в ужас наяву.
Главная проблема игры - неткод, сервера и игроки.

Я не буду говорить про то, что закидывать пати из двух или трех человек в рейтинге 5 на 5 это неадекватно, банально потому что игроки играют надеясь только на своего личного тиммейта, а не на того, которого им подкинула игра. Самая большая боль - это бесконечные обещания разработчиков что-то пофиксить.

Постоянные обещания что-то починить позже, когда-нибудь, через полгода, где-то там. Патчи которые выходят - буквально делают игре хуже и надеется уже мне не на что. Я понимаю, что блеймить за тот же внутриигровой магазин разработчиков не стоит, потому что разные люди в команде отвечают за разные вещи и это не вина абсолютно всех, если разрабы магазина делают дело, а разработчики неткода занимаются каким то бредом. Постоянно пролеты мяча через персонажа, телепортирование оппонента к мячу прямо перед твоим носом - это не норма. С патчами становится только хуже. За ВСЕ время вышло сколько... Два патча? Три? 

И все они не поменяли игру, а лишь ухудшили ее состояние, не считая приоритета вратаря при заборе мяча. Это ЕДИНСТВЕННАЯ вещь, которая реально нужна была игре и была реализована.

I’ve currently played for 81 hours, reached Master 2 rank, and I’m over level 100.

I want to highlight four key issues that, after more than two months without being fixed, have doomed the game:

- Still plagued with bugs
- Unstable connection
- Toxic community with no punishment system
- A battle pass right at launch

I really want to stress that the game has huge potential, but the issues mentioned above make me want to quit, and I fully understand why other players are leaving.

When you climb to higher ranks in competitive play, it feels like there’s no matchmaking at all. Sometimes even at my rank I end up with players who look like they just bought the game, or others who just camp inside the opponent’s goal pressing R3, waiting to shoot the worst shot you’ve ever seen once they get the ball.

And to make things worse, when you finally get a balanced match, it’s very likely you’ll lose due to a bug:
- You steal the ball from an opponent, but they teleport and keep running toward the goal with it.
- As a goalkeeper, instead of diving for the ball, your character does a silly animation of throwing themselves on the spot.
- Suddenly you or another player can’t pick up balls at all, they just pass right through you. If this happens to a goalkeeper, they literally can’t stop shots until they restart the game.
- Teleporting, both for players and the ball, has basically become the norm.

Regarding the connection: it’s partly responsible for some of the bugs above, especially teleporting. And it’s not your fault—even with the best possible internet, the game just runs poorly.

Now, about toxic players: there’s currently no punishment system in place. I don’t know if the devs are afraid of losing more players, but as it stands, there are way too many who will ruin matches and drive people away. Between bad attitudes, AFKs, and players deliberately scoring own goals to force a surrender, you should know before buying this game that if a teammate decides they want to end the match, they can simply force you to lose—and they won’t get any penalty for it. Forced, one-sided forfeits are becoming the norm.

Lastly, and this is more of a personal opinion, I think it’s disgraceful that even though the game is incomplete and has very few appealing character customization options, you still have to pay extra money to unlock the few decent cosmetics, locked behind a battle pass. You’ll see tons of awful character designs, because the only way to make your character look good is either putting in way too much effort or paying up.

As a suggestion, I think more people would be motivated to play—and to play well—if there were actual rewards for climbing ranked.

Limonlu Cheesecake Nasıl Yapılır? İçin Malzemeler
Tabanı için;

100 gr yulaflı bisküvi
50 gr tereyağı
Yarım su bardağı fındık
Kreması için;

2 paket labne peyniri (400 gr)
1 su bardağı toz şeker
1 paket vanilya
2 adet yumurta
1 paket krema (200 ml)
3 yemek kaşığı un
1 adet limon kabuğu rendesi
Limon sosu için;

1 su bardağı su
1 yemek kaşığı nişasta
5 yemek kaşığı toz şeker
1 adet limon suyu
1 adet limon kabuğu rendesi
Çay kaşığının ucuyla zerdeçal

Limonlu cheesecakekin tabanı için öncelikle bisküvileri ve fındığı robottan un gibi olana kadar geçirelim.
Fındıklı bisküvileri bir kaba alalım, üzerine eritilmiş tereyağını ekleyerek karıştıralım.
Kelepçeli kabın tabanına pişirme kağıdı yerleştirelim, makas yardımı ile fazlasını keselim. Ben bu tarifte 20 cm çapında yuvarlak kalıp kullandım.
Kalıbın tabanına kum haline getirdiğimiz bisküvilerimizi yerleştirip kaşıkla bastırarak yerleştirelim.
Kreması için karıştırma kabına labne peyniri alalım ve mikserle çırpalım.
Sıvı kremayı da ekleyerek çırpmaya devam edelim.
Sonrasında toz şeker, yumurta, un, vanilya ve limon kabuğu rendesini ekleyerek tüm malzemeler karışıncaya kadar güzelce çırpalım.
Hazırladığımız kremayı bisküvilerin üzerine yerleştirip önceden ısıttığımız 160°C fırında alt üst fansız ayarda 1 saat kadar pişmeye bırakalım. Pişerken çatlamaması için cheesecakekimizin yanına ısıya dayanıklı bir kapla su koyalım. Piştikten sonra fırının kapağını yarım olacak şekilde açalım da 1 saat bu şekilde dinlenmeye bırakalım.
Limon sosu için tencereye su, şeker, nişasta ve limon suyunu ekleyerek çırpalım.
Malzemeler karıştıktan sonra renk vermesi için zerdeçal ekleyelim ve karıştıralım. Zerdeçal herhangi bir tat vermeyecek yalnızca renginin daha güzel olmasını sağlayacaktır. Dilerseniz kullanmadan da hazırlayabilirsiniz.
Limon kabuğunu da ekleyip karıştırdıktan sonra sosumuzu pişmeye bırakalım. Cheesecakekinizi limonlu sosla yapabileceğiniz gibi farklı soslarla da hazırlayabilirsiniz.
Koyulaşan limonlu sosumuzun altını kapattıktan sonra soğumaya bırakalım. Bu aşamada üzerinin kabuklanmaması için ara ara karıştıralım.
Soğuyan sosumuzu tatlımızın üzerine gezdirelim ve 1 gece dinlenmeye bırakalım. Eğer vaktiniz yoksa bir kaç saatte dinlendirebilirsiniz.
Dinlenen tatlımızı kalıptan çıkartıp üzerini süsledikten sonra dilimleyerek servis edelim.

This was originally a negative review, but the devs finally fixed a lot of things such as adding an aim sens for mnk and crossplay. While it's not perfect, reticle aiming for passes has been a godsend so far for me.

I can't remember the last time I left a review; maybe never--but I have to say something about Rematch.

TL;DR: This game has major potential, but there's too many frustrating bugs and general lack of polish for it's price tag that I don't think the average casual player will have a good time. Check back in a few months and see how it's doing then.

Okay. Here we go.

This is the most conflicted I've felt on a game in a while. On one hand, Rematch is the most fun I've had in a competitive game in years. Even when I'm losing, most of the time I'm still having fun.

Mechanic-wise, it's an absolute blast. Dribbling, dodging opponents, and pulling off combos to score a goal feels unlike anything else I've ever played, and when it works, this game is crack. It's satisfying to nail a pass to a teammate and watch them sink a goal, or watch your goalie save a shot that seemed impossible to catch. Even when you're not actively holding the ball, this game is exciting, and that's a major compliment coming from a guy who doesn't like sports games to begin with. The art style, the sound design, the customization options; I genuinely feel like they nailed it for the most part.

So why the negative review? Well, if you've read any of the other ones here, you've probably noticed that my review isn't unique. A lot of people love this game, but for all Rematch does right, there are just too many glaring issues that make the game mad frustrating. For a fully launched game that costs 30 dollars with in game purchases, I'd expect a pretty high level of polish. The issue is, 50% of the games you play in Rematch, something is going to be wrong. 

Latency is the big one. This game is LAGGY, and when you're not playing a slideshow with people occasionally teleporting around the field, the game just straight up doesn't cooperate. A teammate will pass you the ball, it will lock to your feet, then two seconds later after you've already run down field, the ball disappears and snaps back to where it was like you never caught it. 

You'll tackle it away from an enemy, the game will give you points and make the sound confirming you did so, but then the enemy will just keep on running with the ball like you imagined the whole thing. 

And being goalie? You'd be hard pressed to go 3 games in a row without some Harry Potter ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ happening where the ball either phases through you, or worse, you catch it, but then it teleports into the goal anyway.

But, okay, I hear you. You've got good internet. You don't mind a little stutter here and there. You'll play ball anyway. 

Well good-frickin-luck because it'll take you nearly 5 mins AT LEAST to find one. As of writing, this game still has 8,000 players; It's by no means dead. And considering games are 5 mins (given they don't go overtime), there should be games ending and opening up constantly across the servers. What, is there like, 1 lobby everyone is sharing and they're all just taking turns?

I know this sounds like a lot of connection issues, and so maybe you think it's just me and my internet, but again, look at other reviews. I'm not alone in this. On top of that, even if you get in a game fast and it's not a laggy server, sometimes you just get a game where a team is down a player, and odds are, that spot WILL NOT be filled for the duration of the game. You'll either be getting stomped by a team with more players, or mercilessly stomping one with less, and neither is fun for anyone...

Then there's just the general bugginess. This game is so unpolished, I'm honestly baffled that it was allowed to be released as a full launch. There was a game where my character just slowly began levitating off the ground, and until somebody scored, I just kept flying higher and higher. I nearly hit the sky box before it was reset. There's the ball tracking issues I mentioned before that I suspect often doesn't even have to do with lag, menu issues such as the game not letting you cancel queuing for a match, cosmetics that are just visually broken, leaving bald spots in hair and weird physics that are admittedly sort of funny.

But glitches aside, the game just FEELS unpolished too. Things such as:
-No report feature; something pretty damn important to an online game. Considering how many toxic people you'll encounter, this is almost a must. people will purposefully own goal, throw slurs and hate over chat, and purposefully grief the team just because they're having a bad game.
-Only ranked 5v5s. No ranks 4s, no 3s, only 5s. Good luck coordinating with your team if you're solo or duo queuing ranked, cause 9 times out of 10, the enemy team WILL be in a full squad.
-Inputs on menus feel delayed. 
-Passing the ball with the dedicated button feels way too janky even if it's manageable. 
-Checking the scoreboard just before a goal replay starts will cause it to get stuck on the screen for it's entire duration.
-There's only one daily challenge for gaining extra XP, which is to win a game. The game has been over 2 months now, and they still haven't added more. How about completing passes? Or interceptions? Or saving the ball? How about anything that would be so easy to add, and would encourage players to engage with more mechanics each match?

Reminder, this is a 30 DOLLAR GAME. I understand it's a smaller studio, but there's still no excuse for this. If this game would have launched this way in early access, I really don't think anyone would have batted an eye.

But that's the other thing. I can't help but feel like the devs of this game don't give a crap. They threw micro transactions in before making sure their net code was even straight in a FAST PACED COMPETITIVE SPORTS GAME. If that's not tell of their main focus here, I don't know what is. The game didn't launch with cross play which, while it doesn't effect me, is important to a lot of people, and really is something a game like this launching in this year should have out the gate. To curb the outcry about it, the devs said they'd have it quickly implemented after launch, but once again, it's two months later and still nothing. Two months later, and there's still rampant bugs in the game that people have been complaining about since DAY ONE. 

It'd be one thing if they were open about it, but so far, updates and road maps have been vague at best, and just downright inaccurate at worst. In the first patch notes they released, the devs mentioned how they were proud of the state the game released in, and while I do think they SHOULD be very proud of what they accomplished mechanic-wise, design-wise, and just all around fun-wise, there's too much technologically wrong with this game to enjoy for the casual player. 

I get off work after a long day and just want to come home and get a few chill games in. Not wait so long that I only get to play maybe 3, and those three games are a complete gamble if I'm gonna have a good time or not thanks to the game's programing itself. I'd rather risk my time on another game, and just not play at all. 

The reason I said at the beginning that I'm conflicted about this review is because I WANT this game to do well. To be the next Rocket League. It's a blast, and I want to be able to hop on and play it over the next few years. I don't want to make a negative review because that means less people coming into the already dwindling player base. But I feel like I owe it to the people interested to give the honest truth:

This game has major potential, but unless the developers press on the gas and fix the games problems fast, I fear more people like me that love it are going to stop putting up with it's ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ and go somewhere else.

This game has everything to be great, a lot of potential, mechanics are satisfying to do and it's fun to just mess around with friends, these are the good things about this game but it has some big problems.

The game is dying at a rapid pace and the devs seem to not give a single bit of a ♥♥♥♥ about it. In the last 20 matches I had people own goaling, leaving the game and straight up refuse to play the game in the form of staying in the edge of the box as GK so the enemy team can score and we can't put some1 in goal to defend, in 18 of those 20 games one of these happens, all this while taking over 5 mins to get into a game...

Another HUGE problem is that report system is non-existent (they do have one on their discord server but pretty much useless since it is hand reviewed) and is being less pushed to be put in the game than cross-play which is a whole another topic. 

The servers are already in shambles, people getting high ping in the best region for them and server region shown not corresponding with the actual region of the server are just some of the problems with this games servers, pushing cross-play will honestly aggravate some of these issues, you just wait and see.

Also most players don't know all the buttons, you do have a "tutorial" of sorts but, 1 it can be skipped and 2 it barely teaches you the buttons.

Now, while I'm writing this, the game does have a ranked system, but it doesn't really demonstrate your skill level since:
[olist]
[*]You get paired with random people across the rankings and the matchmaking tries to make the average rank of both teams the same, so basically you could be playing against 2 people in the highest rank, 2 in the lowest, and 1 in the middle rank, while you are in the middle rank paired with 2 more people in the middle rank, 1 of the highest rank and 1 one rank below you, since both teams have the same average rank this scenario could possibly happen.
[*]New players only need to play ~20 games, which is approximately the games needed to reach level 5, to be able to enter this ranked system so you can see where some problems may arise, when you get little Timmy on the other team while you have the best player in the game in your team, either Timmy won't have fun or his teammates won't have fun.
[/olist]

My final comment about this game is, don't buy the game until it is in a better state, if it will ever be in a better state. Let the whales help the game get revenue by buying the cosmetics (which btw they're really cool, cosmetics team cooked) and after the company gets money to invest to make the game better, buy it. It has a really cool design and once again is really satisfying to be able to score, pass and even defending is satisfying.

TL.DR: Don't buy the game until it is in a better state gameplay wise and server wise.

🕒 Playtime: ~90 hours 👍 Recommended (especially with friends)

"Beautiful chaos on a pitch—just bring your own teammates."

After 90 hours in Rematch!, I can confidently say: this game is an absolute blast with friends. The gameplay strikes a great balance—easy to pick up, deceptively hard to master. Whether you're pulling off slick passes or just flailing around in a 5v5 brawl, it’s consistently entertaining.

🎮 Highlights:

⚽ Gameplay: Fast-paced, skill-based, and surprisingly deep once you get into positioning and timing.

🎨 Visuals: Genuinely impressive. The animations and stadiums look fantastic.

🤝 With friends: This is where the game shines. Coordinated plays, shared laughter, and chaotic goals make it a top-tier party game.

⚠️ Frustrations:

🌐 Lag & bugs: Occasionally wacky physics or lag spikes can throw off a match.

😤 Random teammates: Playing solo can be painful. No communication, no passing, and sometimes outright trolling.

🚫 No report system: There really needs to be a post-game report option. It’s long overdue.

📦 Limited modes: Only 3v3, 4v4, and 5v5. Fun, but it gets repetitive. A ranked mode, mini-games, or custom lobbies would go a long way.

🧠 Final Thoughts: Rematch! is a gem when played with the right people. It’s got the bones of a great competitive sports brawler, but it needs more polish and content to keep players engaged long-term. If you’ve got a squad, dive in. If you’re flying solo… prepare for some emotional damage.

Rematch aurait pu être une pépite… mais aujourd’hui, c’est surtout un énorme gâchis.

Le concept est fun, vraiment. Quand tout fonctionne, on sent le potentiel d’un jeu compétitif nerveux et agréable. Mais la réalité, c’est qu’on passe plus de temps à s’énerver qu’à s’amuser.

Les bugs sont omniprésents : ballons qui disparaissent ou se téléportent, tirs arrêtés qui finissent malgré tout au fond des filets, interceptions parfaites qui n’existent que sur votre écran… Et je ne parle même pas des dé-sync serveur qui vous font passer à travers la balle comme un fantôme.

Côté gameplay, c’est encore pire en matchmaking solo : personne ne joue collectif, pas de passes, tout le monde se prend pour Zidane ou Ronaldo version freestyle, et la frustration grimpe très vite. Il n’y a aucun système de signalement, aucune sanction, et pas même une option pour abandonner une partie qui tourne au cauchemar. Résultat : vous restez coincé dans des matchs perdus d’avance, à subir pendant de longues minutes.

Le mode compétitif, censé être le cœur du jeu, est une mauvaise blague : matchmaking complètement incohérent, parties déséquilibrées, rangs invisibles, et un système de points qui n’a ni logique ni constance. Pendant ce temps, les développeurs semblent se concentrer sur la boutique cosmétique et le battle pass plutôt que sur les vrais problèmes.

Et pourtant… quand on joue entre amis et que le serveur tient, le jeu peut être incroyablement fun. Les mécaniques de base sont bonnes, la personnalisation est sympa, et il y a même un mode libre intéressant pour s’entraîner. Mais aujourd’hui, le positif est enterré sous une montagne de bugs, de désynchronisations et de comportements toxiques.

En l’état, Rematch n’est pas un jeu fini. Si vous voulez éviter de perdre vos nerfs – et votre argent – le mieux reste d’attendre quelques mois (voire un an) pour voir si les développeurs prennent enfin les bonnes décisions.

Avis (70h de jeu) :
Franchement, Rematch avait tout pour être fun… mais la réalité, c’est un terrain miné de bugs. Les collisions partent en freestyle, les ballons disparaissent comme par magie, et les serveurs donnent l’impression de jouer depuis un micro-ondes posé sur la Lune.

Et le pire ? Les joueurs. Aucune intelligence collective. C’est censé être un jeu de foot, mais ici tout le monde se prend pour Ronaldo du dimanche, tête baissée, en mode solo queue. Résultat : zéro passe, zéro construction, juste du chaos. Autant jouer avec des plots, au moins eux restent à leur place.

J’ai filmé des parties pour prouver le délire : le ballon qui se téléporte dans les mains du gardien, les lags qui flinguent tes actions, et ce pique-avantage ridicule qui fait que t’as toujours l’impression de courir avec des sabots alors que les autres sont en fusée. On appelle ça un jeu compétitif ? C’est surtout une punition.

Bref : 70 heures de galère pour conclure que le potentiel est enterré sous une montagne de bugs et de joueurs individualistes. Pour l’instant, Rematch, c’est plus un sketch qu’un jeu.

Melhor jogo de futebol já lançado, muito divertido e muito melhor que fifa, mas ao mesmo tempo é muito estressante. Chega a ser incômodo a quantidade de bugs e exploits, toda semana tem um problema diferente, já enfrentei diversos bugs mas os mais BIZARROS foram:

- todos os jogadores estarem invisíveis para mim
- gravidade aumentada (não conseguia pular e o jogo me puxava para baixo imediatamente)
- eu era "intocável" (não conseguia bloquear, nem receber e nem encostar na bola)
- todos os jogadores estarem "pelados" e sem cabeça (incapaz de diferenciar meu time do time inimigo)

Sem contar as inúmeras vezes que você fica na frente do cara na hora de chutar e não bloqueia a bola, esse sistema falho de "prioridade" na hora de dominar a bola, body blocks sem sentidos, os carrinhos bugados, goleiro pegando a bola na mão fora da área, troféus não computam direito, não mudou nada do beta para a versão final, não tem sistema de report, replay todo travado...

Além de que a empresa lança conteúdo novo a cada 1 mês, e quando lança é tipo só uma comemoração, prometeram crossplay e até agora nada, não tem histórico de partida (essencial num jogo competitivo), falta um sistema de recompensa por atingir tal rank (cheguei no rank elite e não senti nada demais, foi só um sentimento de chegar num elo qualquer), não consertam bugs básicos... coisas simples que são o básico para manter um jogo ativo e esse jogo não oferece. A player base está morrendo e é justificado porque a empresa é muito desatenciosa com os fãs do jogo.

Allerdings gibt es noch einige Probleme: Zum einen treten noch viele Bugs auf, zum anderen leidet das Spiel oft unter serverseitiger Latenz, was aktuell das größte Problem darstellt. Zusätzlich würde ich mir ein Report-System wünschen, um ein faireres Spielerlebnis zu ermöglichen.

Прекрасная игра, которая "застоялась"
Для развития необходимо что то придумывать и вводить что то новое, не только донатные скины.
Одному играть невозможно, постоянно попадаются деффектные тиммейты с ЧСВ и крайней стадией эгоизма, что такое пас - неизвестно, лучше выбегу из ворот и пойду в нападение, ворота там и без меня хорошо стоят
Играть стоит исключительно в пати, управление удобное, затея классная.
Часто встречаются проблемы с серверами, пинг периодически скачет, что недопустимо в таком типе игр.
Если разработчики не начнут что то предпринимать - к концу года онлайна не будет, уже с трудом находятся игры.
Не люблю футбольные симуляторы, но это исключение, сама игра понравилась, затея очень классная, реализация тоже (в плане удобства управления и получения эмоций), но имеется прилично проблем которые необходимо оперативно решать, чего разработчики не делают.
Положительный отзыв только в надежде, что разработчики одумаются и начнут ковырять сетевой код.

Reclamação sobre problemas no Rematch

Venho através desta expor alguns pontos que prejudicam bastante a experiência no Rematch, principalmente para quem joga ranqueado e leva o jogo a sério. Apesar de ser um jogo com grande potencial, existem falhas que comprometem a jogabilidade e acabam desmotivando os jogadores.

Problemas de prioridade em disputas aéreas
Quando a bola está no ar, muitas vezes não fica claro quem terá prioridade para cabecear ou chutar. Isso gera situações frustrantes, em que dois jogadores disputam o mesmo lance e o resultado parece totalmente aleatório, tirando a sensação de controle do jogador.

Falhas do goleiro
O goleiro não consegue pegar a bola com as mãos quando ela está no chão, mesmo em situações claras onde seria natural agarrar. Isso torna a posição extremamente limitada e irrealista, além de favorecer jogadas “bugadas” do adversário.

Domínio de bola inconsistente
O sistema de domínio é falho. Muitas vezes a bola “escapa” de forma antinatural, mesmo em lances simples, o que quebra a fluidez do jogo e atrapalha o desenvolvimento das jogadas.

Jogadores quitando ou trollando em partidas ranqueadas
O maior problema competitivo: pessoas quitam constantemente no meio das partidas ranqueadas e não recebem punição adequada. Além disso, há jogadores que trollam de propósito, seja fazendo gols contra, evitando ajudar na defesa ou simplesmente ficando “na banheira” esperando a bola, sem nunca contribuir de verdade. Isso desbalanceia o jogo e estraga completamente a experiência dos demais.

Jogadores caindo da partida
Além dos que quitam ou trollam, há também situações em que jogadores caem da partida (já aconteceu comigo) e isso prejudica tanto o time quanto o equilíbrio do jogo. Não existe nenhum tipo de compensação ou ajuste quando isso ocorre.

Sistema de denúncia ineficiente
A aba de denúncia leva diretamente para o perfil da Steam, o que não resolve nada em relação ao comportamento do jogador dentro do Rematch. Não há um sistema interno para reportar trapaças, comportamento tóxico ou abandono de partida.

Sugestões

Melhorar o sistema de colisão e prioridade em disputas de bola.

Ajustar as mecânicas do goleiro para que ele possa agarrar a bola no chão.

Revisar e tornar mais responsivo o domínio de bola.

Implementar punições claras para jogadores que abandonam ou trollam partidas ranqueadas.

Estudar uma forma de reduzir o impacto de jogadores que caem da partida, seja com sistema de reconexão ou IA substituta.

Criar um sistema de denúncia dentro do jogo, simples e funcional.

O Rematch tem tudo para ser um jogo competitivo de alto nível, mas esses pontos acabam desmotivando a comunidade. Uma atenção maior a esses problemas faria toda diferença.
