É um bom jogo, mas tem seus problemas.
Algo inevitável é lidar com jogadores fominhas que não passam a bola e etc, principalmente em elos mais baixos, deveria ter um sistema mais "recompensador" para jogadores que joguem em equipe, além de apenas dar mais pontos de passe.
Uma opção para mutar os pings, é muito chato o cara ficar spammando durante a partida, mas nesse assunto de comunicação também a implementação de um chat de texto SAUDAVEL e mais variações para os pings iam ser legais.
Um fator offline, como tinha nos FIFAS 16,17,18 com o Hunter, ia ser legal, principalmente em um universo interessante como o do rematch.
Personalização de características físicas, como altura e peso, traria mais variedade dos personagens, e faria mais sentido as pessoas adaptarem sua posição a seu personagem de escolha.
Na questão de táticas, seria interessante quando houver uma party fechada, um modo de definir posições para os players, não que eles seriam fixos naquela posição, mas simplesmente ajustando a equipe automaticamente, facilitando muito, claro sendo totalmente opcional, sempre com a rotação de posições ativada por automático.
Gostaria que tivesse um modo de criação de party mais eficiente, não existe chat de texto mesmo fora das partidas e não existe uma opção de "Rejogar com a mesma equipe" após o fim de uma partida.
Uma opção de denuncia interna do jogo, já cai com players que não necessariamente cometeram um crime por exemplo, mas definitivamente não fazem bem a comunidade, então não seria correto eu denuncia-lo por abuso, sendo que o cara simplesmente pega a bola sempre que pode e faz gol contra.
Acho que um cooldown para a transição de jogador linha para goleiro seria legal, diversas vezes já driblei uma defesa inteira, para um atacante chegar no último segundo, se tornar goleiro, não necessariamente ruim, mas seria interessante.
Problemas de conexão e bugs no geral, muitas vezes players teleportam e as vezes a bola meio que fica presa na lugar e depois teleporta para pessoa que estava com a posse, além da hitbox dela seja meio estranha na hora de driblar, o cara acerto meu calcanhar, e eu perco a posse de bola, denovo isso é uma recomendação pessoal, não necessariamente deveria ser aplicado.
Mais variedades nas animações de dribles, as animações desse jogo são impecáveis, mas seria legal se variassem por movimento, ou talvez existisse algo como: "Street Drible Pack" que você pode definir uma animação diferente para cada drible, então nesse pacote teria animações para dribles com mais firulas por exemplo.
E, no futuro, algo como o premier do Valorant ou Pro Clubs do FIFA seria MUITO legal, principalmente em um jogo de futebol.
Enfim, muito divertido de se jogar com amigos, potencial extremo para E-Sports, além de uma comunidade engajada em sua boa parte, recomendo pegar na promoção pois é bem caro kk.

У REMATCH, как и у России, две беды. Только если у нас это дураки и дороги, то у REMATCH — аудитория и разработчики.

Концепция игры до боли проста, но благодаря этому гениальна. Пятеро игроков, один круглый мяч, прямоугольное поле со стенами, отсутствие душных правил по типу офсайда и одна цель — закати мяч в ворота. В игре примитивный дриблинг, но большего от него не нужно, несколько вариантов возможности давать пас и несколько вариантов удара по воротам. Кажется, что количество механик ограниченное и времени на вхождению в игру тратить не нужно, но это только на первый взгляд. Для комфортной игры нужно сначала привыкнуть к тому, как правильно контролировать камеру, почувствовать силу удару и пасов, понять кучу скрытых механик (типа подброса мяча или паса головой), понять кучу скрытых-скрытых механик (типа того, что мяч лучше забирать с двойным ускорением или как отбирать мяч у дриблеров, находясь в стойке) и много чего ещё — короче, чему поучиться есть.

Я в эту игру начинал играть с закрытого бета-тест. В первый месяц было нереально сложно всем — и господи, как это было прекрасно! Эти нелепые голы, забитые только с помощью футбольного бога; эти нервные вратари, которые прыгали от любого удара в противоположную сторону от мяча; эти искренние эмоции, когда ты забивал мяч от ворот до ворот, потому что случайно ударил, а не дал пас, а вратарь соперников потерял ворота. Это был настоящий старый экспириенс соревновательных игр, в которых было распределение по уровню и в которых существовали новички.

[h2] АУДИТОРИЯ [/h2]

Но бета-тест закончился, с ним закончился и вот такой фан первооткрывателей. Игра в июне выходит в свет — без какой-либо плашки "ранний доступ" и прочих непотребств! — и любители [strike] футб... [/strike] "Рокет Лиги" готовы врываться в новую игрулечку.

И тут начинается адище. Не сразу, конечно, но где-то через месяц появляются они, [i] гайдеры и ноулайферы [/i] — те самые люди, которые портят любую соревновательную игру. Одни задротят каждый день по 20 часов и уже через неделю имеют 1500 сыгранных матчей, а другие тоже столько же играют, но ещё и от и до прочесывают эту игру в поисках всех механик, а потом благородно делятся находками с ноулайферами.

Вы вчера играли и всё было нормально, но уже сегодня люди по какой-то причине бьют в стену, а потом отлетевший мячик пуляют в штрафную? Всё было хорошо вчера, а уже сегодня люди делают блейдшоты? Это спасибо гайдерам. Теперь, пока они не найдут что-то новое, все будут играть вот так.

Ты заходишь и вместо нормального геймплея с пасами и командной игрой получаешь, по-моему, четверо ботов в свою команду, которые занимаются безумием — повторяют одни и те же действия из раза в раз. Благо, что у игры есть войсчат и можно проверить, живой ли человек или бот с тобой играет. Плохо, что, скорее всего, тебе по итогу ответит животное.

REMATCH хоть и является одной из худшей выполненных в качестве технического плана игрой (об этом дальше), но всё же, кажется, что под ужасным неткодом она имеет некоторые возможности для построения уникального геймплея. Как-то мы с друзьями решили переводить мяч на фланг или пробовать давать пасы через стену, да и вообще много чего пробовали, получалось коряво и неточно, зато было по-своему, а когда наши тактики срабатывали, мы радостно кричали: "♥♥♥♥♥ НИХУЯЯЯЯЯ". Вот этот занимательный настоящий видеоигровой опыт убивается, когда ты, во-первых, понимаешь, что сыграться с другими игроками невозможно ввиду того, что они все мыслят гайдами, а во-вторых, потому что игра, к сожалению, технически мертва.

[h2] РАЗРАБОТЧИКИ [/h2]

Sloclap, конечно, великолепные французские ребята, знающие толк в искусстве. Я не могу не отметить, что в игре неплохой дизайн, нормальная графика, подходящая под сеттинг; действительно хорошая кастомизация (только жаль, что аудитория предпочитает создавать коров), классные победные анимации, а ещё прикольная озвучка на всех языках, кроме английского. Смотреть на игру, не играя в неё, мне нравится, косметически своего персонажа настраивать тоже, а вот всё, что касается самой игры, — мне не нравится.

Всё пошло плохо, на самом деле, с самого начала — EasyAntiCheat. Он вам жить спокойно не даст, будет тихонько и громко в походящие и неподходящие моменты напоминать о себе. Кому-то он фепесы заберет, кому-то игру постоянно будет отрубать, короче, смиритесь. 

Дальше всё идет хуже: разработчики французские почему-то... ну... Знаете вот классическая вещь в СОРЕВНОВАТЕЛЬНЫХ играх — репорт игроков? Их нет. Репортить нельзя. Можно только жаловаться на игроков в их... дискорд-канале. Записывайте видео, идите в Дискорд и жалуйтесь. В принципе,  я так и угрожал всяким коровам, которые в свои ворота забивали.

А знаете, что ещё в соревновательных играх есть? Система рангов. Ну типа когда слабые играют со слабыми и всё такое. А вот её нет совсем. Все играют со всеми— платины с элитой, серебро с платиной. Вчера зашедший в игру играет со мной, я играю с ноулайферами или стримерами. А знаете, что ещё смешнее? В игре нельзя опустить свой ранг. Вы можете только в самом ранге упасть в дивизионе, но если вы достигли условной платины, вы никогда не опуститесь до золота. Вам никогда не станет чуточку полегче, вы обречены быть заложником своего ранга, потому что в противном случае это было бы слишком токсично (с) — снижать вам ранг.

Знаете, что ещё у Sloclap не получилось? Сделать работающую видеоигру. Вечные телепортации, зависания мяча, "я был первый на мяче! — ♥♥♥♥♥ иди" ситуации, удар по мячу, который не регистрируется, или взятый вратарем мяч, который пролетают сквозь его руки, — и это каж-дый бо-жий матч. Я говорю — каж-дый, без исключений. 
Проблема в том, что в игре не хватает пакетов, в нормальной игре их должно быть от 1500, в этой, дай бог, будет 600. Сервера так же в говне, раньше ещё могло кинуть на китайский, где вы играли с пингом 300, но сейчас кидает на европейский с пингом 80. СНГшных серверов нет, хотя в эту игру преимущественно играют русскоязычные (можете оценить по количеству обзоров на русском языке в сравнении с другими).

В игре ещё: 
🔴 не было ни одного крупного   нормального патча за три месяца (зато уже добавили кучу новых футболистов типа тер Штегена — я, кстати, вообще не видел, чтобы его покупали);
🔴 никакой внятной дорожной карты от разрабов, где они хотя бы намекнули на развитие игры;
🔴 никакой системы оповещений в игре о новых косметических предметах (это просто насколько им пох...);
🔴 куча мелких бесячих вещей — например, в игре нельзя настроить, какая форма будет у соперника, поэтому часто бывали случаи, когда у меня стояла темно-зеленая форма, а у соперника — темно-фиолетовая, и мне было физически больно, пришлось делать форму "Боруссии": она ни с  кем не сочетается;
🔴 и много чего прочего.

Могу ли я посоветовать эту игру? Ни в коем случае. 

Время, потраченное на вхождение, окажется для вас пустым: в нынешнем виде в эту игру неприятно играть. С одной стороны вас душит бывшее рокетлигное (и почему-то каэсное) комьюнити быдларей-ноулайферов-задротов или, наоборот, возомнивших себя Месси абобусов [ладно, иногда попадались забавные немцы], с другой стороны вас убивает разработчик-похуист, которые не может исправить ни одной проблемы, а только добавляет новые (например, сейчас в игре такой баг (?), что мяч засчитывается, если только коснется СЕТКИ ВОРОТ [в правилах футбола нужно пересечь ленточку]).

Я не верю, что эту игру починят. У Sloclap уже был опыт с игрой Absolver, которая тоже в задумке была гениальна, но реализация была на таком же уровне — с убитым неткодом и серверами.

Если игру сделают бесплатной (об этом мечтает мой друг Керил), то пробуйте. Пару вечеров будет весело поиграть. А так — не лезьте сюда.

En cuanto a la jugabilidad, el manejo en el partido es un 10/10; me encantó. La comunidad es bastante pro, aunque siempre aparece algún troll suelto.

Deberían incluirlo en los e-sports profesionales porque es muy bueno. La moneda del juego es fácil de conseguir jugando, y la mayoría de los cosméticos se pueden comprar así. Además, no dan ninguna ventaja injusta —ni en físicas ni en hitbox, como ocurre en Rocket League—, lo cual se agradece.

En fin, es un juego que vale la pena incluso para aprender los fundamentos del fútbol sala o del fútbol callejero.

Il gioco sulla carta potrebbe anche essere bello, ma è PIENO di difetti assurdi che lo rendono frustrante al massimo.

Non è possibile che sei in difesa, l’avversario crossa e tu ti sforzi per andare di testa… e invece lui TUTTE le volte, nel 95% dei casi, ti anticipa con una ROVESCIATA e segna come se nulla fosse!!! Ma stiamo scherzando?!

La palla a volte fluttua nel nulla come se avesse vita propria: non sai se andare avanti, indietro o buttarti per aria, perché sembra che le leggi della fisica non esistano.

In attacco poi è RIDICOLO: fai un passaggio rasoterra e il portiere, anziché tuffarsi in basso, si butta in alto e comunque riesce a prenderla! E non basta: se fai un passaggio da muro e il portiere si tuffa in anticipo, riesce pure a bloccarla CON LA SCHIENA, come se avesse le mani attaccate al culo! Ma dai, almeno un minimo di realismo, visto che l’essere umano non ha ancora sviluppato arti supplementari!

Gioco davvero agghiacciante, roba da lanciare il controller contro il muro.

On paper, the game could actually be good, but it’s FULL of ridiculous flaws that make it insanely frustrating.

It makes no sense: you’re defending, the opponent crosses, you fight to go for a header… and instead, EVERY SINGLE TIME, like 95% of the cases, they manage to pull off a BICYCLE KICK and score as if it were nothing!!! Are you kidding me?!

Sometimes the ball just floats around like it has a life of its own: you don’t even know whether to move forward, backward, or just jump in the air, because it feels like the laws of physics don’t exist.

And attacking is just PATHETIC: you make a ground pass, and the goalkeeper— instead of diving low—throws himself up high and still manages to catch it! And it gets worse: if you do a wall pass and the goalkeeper dives early, he somehow manages to block the ball WITH HIS BACK, as if he had hands sticking out of his ass! Come on, at least a bit of realism—human beings haven’t exactly evolved extra limbs yet!

An absolutely dreadful game, the kind that makes you want to smash your controller against the wall.

Rematch es un juego que sorprende por su originalidad y por la manera en que pone al jugador en el centro de la acción deportiva de manera estratégica y divertida. En lugar de limitarse a ser un simulador tradicional, permite organizar, grabar y revivir momentos clave de partidos, haciendo que cada jugada y cada decisión sean importantes. La combinación de gestión, rapidez y observación genera una experiencia envolvente y adictiva.

El juego se destaca por su sistema interactivo: tenés que anticipar movimientos, reaccionar rápido y elegir los momentos exactos para registrar o actuar, lo que exige atención y estrategia constante. La interfaz es clara y funcional, permitiendo concentrarte en el juego sin perderte en menús complicados.

Visualmente, Rematch apuesta a un estilo limpio y colorido, con animaciones fluidas que hacen que cada acción se vea clara y emocionante. Los efectos de sonido y la música refuerzan la tensión y la emoción de cada momento, aumentando la inmersión.

En resumen, Rematch es ideal para quienes buscan un juego dinámico, estratégico y entretenido, donde cada decisión cuenta y la diversión proviene tanto de la gestión como de la acción. Es un título que combina creatividad, planificación y emoción de manera muy satisfactoria.

[h1]Игра затягивает и имеет большой потенциал[/h1]

но в данный момент она тонет в проблемах... Именно так начинался мой первый обзор на эту игру. Но вот прошло уже несколько месяцев, разработчики игру не бросили. Поправили многие проблемы, сбалансировали геймплей и теперь это совсем другая игра.

Плюсы описывать не буду. Это единственная в своем роде игра. Уже одного этого хватит чтобы просто попробовать свои силы в матче. И стоит один раз сыграть матч, как сразу принимаешь решение — или бросаешь ее, или остаешься в ней на сотни часов.

Что касается минусов, которые имели место быть, но кое что уже исправили:

[*]Вылеты из матчей. Была такая частая проблема, но после всех правок нет кода я не замечаю прошлых проблем. Сам не вылетаю и другие не вылетают. Бывает САМИ выходят, но это проблема игроков, а не игры.
[*]Поправили рассинхрон мяча в спорных ситуациях, из-за чего он мог телепортироваться от вас (или к вам). Тут ушла не одна итерация апдейтов, но в общем ситуацию привели к справедливой. Больше нет ситуаций "нечестного" решения сервера. Правда игра зависима от ПИНГА, но и другие сетевые игры зависят от того же.
[*]Добавили систему репортов и штрафы за выходы. Теперь во всех гриферов можно раскидываться жалобами.
[*]Была проблема с подбором игроков. Тут тоже проведена работа. Я больше не наблюдаю какого то сильного разброса по скилам в рандомной тиме. Хотя игра с собственной командой все еще самая комфортная.
[*]А вот спорная монетизация осталась. Игра ПЛАТНАЯ + есть BATTLEPASS + есть магазин с косметикой только за РЕАЛ. Тут видимо все так и будет. Хотя бы спасибо за 100% кэшбэк валюты в баттлпассе в случае его полного закрытия, а закрывается он не сказать что долго и сложно.

В общем игру рекомендую, хотя бы на "ПОПРОБОВАТЬ". За пару часов вполне можно сформировать мнение, благо один матч это минут 6-10. Рефанд сделать успеете. Но держите в голове, что МАТЧИ сразу после покупки это ОДНО, а МАТЧИ спустя сотню часов собственного опыта это совсем другое дело.

reviews.review:
This is a very fun game, but it's not very *good*. Playing a 5 stack in ranked with friends is a great time, and most of the time I am enjoying myself whether I'm in that 5 stack or solo q'ing ranked. However, there are a lot of server issues, and ball issues that make the game feel very random at times. The ball with teleport into the floor only to show up at someones feet 3 seconds later like they'd been in control of it the whole time. Goals will be scored where the keeper clearly blocked/caught it but it somehow ended up either behind them, or it did bounce out but it still counted, the keeper in general is actually kinda weird so here goes. There is no way to "control" where you dive as a goalkeeper, there's a sort of aim assist whenever you dive that will guide you to where the ball will end up. This though, leads to it's own host of issues where you'll go to dive for a high ball that's on its way down, but if you dive too early, the game will auto-aim you to the ground, where the ball will end up, and then someone will shoot over you which is not a good feeling in what seems to be a competitive game. Again, very fun, I like it, I will keep playing it, but it is still in beta as far as I'm concerned and should not be purchased with the expectation that it is a complete product. 
TLDR; Game is fun for me, but not finished yet and has many issues that will likely be resolved but I'm yet to see improvements.

The game was released on June 19, 2025, and as of today, August 23, 2025, we are facing a disgraceful spectacle.

No reporting system. A multiplayer without any way to report cheaters, bug exploiters, toxic players, AFKers, or quitters. This isn’t an oversight: it’s pure incompetence.

No crossplay. I won’t even bother mentioning it: it’s useless anyway. Just further proof of inadequacy.

Goalkeepers rewrite physics. The ball goes into the net, but if the keeper dives the right way, the ball teleports into his hands inside the goal. No goal. Visionary work.

Goalkeeper automatons. You don’t control them, they decide whether to dive high, low, or halfway. Curved shots? The system short-circuits and the keeper turns into a bowling pin. Brilliant.

Unreal tackles. The ball gets stuck in the ground like a monolith, completely ignoring the laws of physics. Beyond ridiculous: a marble block.

Absurd challenges. Leg smashing into shin, femur, or fibula? The player just keeps going as if nothing happened. This isn’t programming: it’s black magic.

Tackles on the support foot. The opponent still manages to shoot and score despite the challenge. This isn’t a stadium: it’s David Copperfield’s stage.

Training sessions. You finish a workout and instead of replaying it, you’re thrown back to the main menu. No replay button, no improvement, just laziness and sloppiness.

Collision priority system. Two players jump for the same ball? The game flips a coin. Congratulations, you coded a slot machine.

Disconnected teammate. You concede a goal, and at kickoff the ball stays still because it was his turn to take it. Result? Free possession for the opponents. A genius lesson in applied mathematics.

And then the final blow: you can’t even create your own team. No logo, no kit, no identity. In 2025, when even a two-dollar indie game lets you design an emblem, here you’re stuck with lifeless, prefab teams. Football without colors, without pride.

There’s more, but in short, this title is an early access disguised as a full game. It’s not ready, it’s not polished, and it shows no respect for paying players. And the price? An insult, a legalized robbery.

This isn’t a video game: it’s a prototype thrown onto the market, a faded imitation of what digital football should be.

É um bom game, ainda mais pra quem gosta de futebol. Pra quem já jogou Rocket League, a mecânico é parecida. O melhor é juntar os amigos para formar equipe e se divertir, quem sabe subir de rank. Jogo pode melhorar em aspectos de comésticos e personalizações, ainda tem poucas opções se formos pensar no mundo do futebol.

Il gioco è uscito il 19 giugno 2025 e ad oggi, 23 agosto 2025, siamo davanti a uno spettacolo indegno.

Reportistica assente. Un multiplayer senza sistema di segnalazione per cheater, bug abusi, tossici, AFK e abbandoni. Non è una dimenticanza: è pura incompetenza.

Crossplay inesistente. Non lo cito nemmeno: tanto è inutile. È solo ulteriore prova di inadeguatezza.

I portieri riscrivono la fisica. Il pallone entra in porta, ma se il portiere si tuffa nel verso giusto, la palla si teletrasporta tra le sue mani all'interno della porta, no goal. Che visionari.

Portieri automi. Non li comandi, decidono loro se buttarsi in alto, in basso o a metà. Tiri ad effetto? Il sistema  impazzisce e il portiere diventa un birillo. Grande intraprendenza.

Contrasti irreali. La palla si pianta nel terreno come un monolite, fregandosene delle leggi della fisica. Siamo oltre il ridicolo:  blocco marmoreo.

Tackle ridicoli. Gamba tesa su tibia, femore o  perone? Il giocatore prosegue tranquillo come se fosse un fantasma. Questa non è programmazione: è magia nera.

Tackle sui piedi d’appoggio. L’avversario calcia comunque e segna nonostante l'intervento. Qui non siamo in uno stadio: siamo allo show di David Copperfield.

Sessioni di allenamento. Finisci un workout e invece di poterlo ripetere subito vieni scaraventato al menù principale. Niente tasto replay, niente miglioramento, solo sufficienza e pressapochismo.

Sistema di priorità degli scontri. Due giocatori saltano sulla stessa palla? Il gioco lancia una monetina. Complimenti, avete programmato una slot machine.

Compagno disconnesso. Subisci un gol, ma al calcio d’inizio la palla resta ferma perché toccava a lui battere. Risultato? Regalate palla agli avversari. Geniale lezione di matematica applicata.

Ci sarebbe dell'altro,ma in sintesi questo titolo è un early access spacciato per gioco completo. Non è pronto, non è rifinito, non è rispettoso verso chi paga. E il prezzo? Un insulto, un furto legalizzato.

Questo non è un videogioco: è un prototipo buttato sul mercato.

Esse jogo é um parente distante do falecido FIFA Street, mas que exige [b]trabalho em equipe[/b].
Ele é absurdamente divertido, é muito satisfatório jogar bem (seja qual for a posição em campo). Fazer um passe, um drible, um gol, uma defesa difícil, uma roubada de bola e/ou uma assistência é absurdamente foda. 
Apesar de achar esse jogo incrível, ele tem uma das piores experiências de ranqueada que já joguei na minha vida, recomendo comprar esse jogo para jogar com algum amigo ou time, jogar solo é a receita mais fácil para se ficar maluco. 
Recomendo muito esse jogo, para quem jogou e sente falta de um jogo estilo FIFA Street e ainda mais pra quem tá cansado dos mesmos jogos de futebol que são relançados ano apos ano sendo mais do mesmo.

Nach meiner ersten äußert negativen Rezension habe ich weitere 6 Stunden Spielzeit gesammelt. 
Meine Erfahrung:
1. NETCODE: Also prinzipiell fühlt sich der Netcode so an als hätte man einen ungelösten Rubix-Cube auf dem Boden zerschmettert und anschließend noch ordentlich mit Schei*e beworfen. Als Beispiel: Man bekommt eine Art Zeichen falls der Charakter den Ball THEORETISCH annehmen KÖNNTE. Also sollte der Ball nach seinem Langstreckenflug durch 45 Spieler, 4 Wänden der Decke und vermutlich auch durch das Brandenburger Tor endlich mal in die Nähe eines Spielers kommen, kann es gut möglich sein das der Annahme-Input auch mal 5 Sekunden verzögert ist oder erst gar nicht erkannt wird. Das ist aber prinzipiell mit jedem Input so. Cool oder?

2. RANKING-SYSTEM: Da haben die Devs vermutlich 1 oder vielleicht auch 14 Tequila Shots zuviel inhaliert. Angenommen man ist im Rang Diamant:
     1. Man kann mit z.B. Gold Spielern in eine Runde kommen.
     2. Man kann nicht deranken.
Ist man einmal Diamant, bleibt man Diamant. 
Da stellt sich mir nur die Frage: Waren sie wirklich einfach nur angetrunken, oder haben sie ihre Lehrbücher umgedreht gelesen?

3. PATCHES: Die sogenannten "Patches" welche gefühlsmäßig eher "Downgrades" heißen sollten kommen ca. alle 2 Monate. Sollte man sich so einen "Patch" mal durchlesen, schreiben sie das Sachen gepatcht wurden welche verbuggt waren (logisch). Als ich also mit neuer Motivation und Hoffnung auf ein unverbuggtes Rematch das Game startete, merkte ich spätestens nach dem 2. Match das alles beim alten war, meistens wurde es sogar noch schlimmer. Die Bugfixes bewirken in der Regel gar nichts und bei den Server-Updates bin ich mir nicht einmal sicher ob die Devs dieses Wort jemals gesehen haben.

+ Punkt für die Idee des games, und dem Ingame Shop.

Kommen wir zur Schlussfolgerung: Das Gamedesign ist wirklich gut, das Game würde auch wirklich bock machen wären nicht die ganzen Mankos. Ich bin der Meinung, dass man nach jedem Patch wieder einmal reinschauen sollte, es kann ja sein das sich ja irgendwann wirklich irgendwas verbessert! Danke für Eure Zeit.

●まず、ゲームとしての評価ですが、
そこまで複雑でもないはずなのですが、
バグ、グリッチが横行しており、
また、触れたはずのボールに同期ズレが発生してすり抜けが多発するなど、
運営に対して、「オープンベータの記憶全部飛んだんか？」
と言わざるを得ない内容に対して、値段が見合っていない（高い）と感じます。

〇次にマッチングですが、発売から時間は経っていないはずですが
すでに人口が少なく、
時間帯によっては１０分経過で勝手にキャンセルされます。
朝と昼は会えません。きっと彼らは夜行性です。

プレイヤーの質も低く、
ゴール前でボールをピヨピヨと呼ぶだけで動かない足の折れた雛鳥をはじめ、

敵チームとお手手を繋いで仲良くお散歩しながら
ボール要求だけは立派にこなす、お遊戯会の園児

こちらがボールを持てば金魚の糞のように付いてきたりするうえ、
味方からボールをさらっていき、敵にボールを献上されるなど、
相手チームへの思いやりに溢れたプレイヤーも多く、とってもあったまり、
心が揺れ動くようなプレイヤーの皆様にはひきつってあがった口角が下がってきません。

ボールは友達とは言いますが、いまだに球離れが出来ず、
ボールを持たない間は要求だけしてくる様は赤ん坊のおしゃぶりのようです。
はい、カウンター成功したのに、敵が戻り切りましたね

前にしかボールを飛ばさない適当投石器からの

「ナイス」「頑張ろう」という選択肢の少ないなか絞り出した
応援(罵声）が飛び交うなど、プレイヤーの熱気にとても溢れています。

フルパゲーすぎてソロ・少人数で遊びたい時、
REMATCHという名が付けられているのに、
『再戦』ボタンを押す勇気がでません。

ゲームとしてはリアルサッカーをしている気分になれ面白いと思うが、そうはならず。その時代のメタ個人技やそれを好むプレイヤーのせいで面白くない場合が多い。

現在での最高ランク帯でのプレイヤースキルは他サッカーゲームと比べ、戦術理解・パスワークは高くないのでサッカーに理解がある人は追いつけます。また、オフェンスディフェンス時のローテーション、オフザボールに関してもできない人が多い上、単なるメタや個人技でイキっているプレイヤーが多く、また崇拝されている風潮にあります。
個人技で90%以上ゴールを決めれる決定力がある人ならそれは一つの戦術だと思うが、パスワークやフィールドを走る能力が欠損しているプレイヤーが多いため、メタ個人技のFW選手へパスが渡り何度もそのプレイヤーがシュートを打つ機会があるため相対的に決定力が高く見えている場合があり、崇拝されている場合がある。
以上の理由から、日本圏のプレイスタイルでは強引なクロス、FWのボールが吸い付くような個人技（グリッチ的な要素もある）からのシュートが主流なのでサッカーとしての面白みは少し欠ける。このゲームはリアルサッカーの再現可能性は高いと思うので、動きやパスワークに重きをおけるプレイヤーが参入してくれることを切に祈る。

そういうプレイヤー初心者でもフレ待ってます＾＾

At release, I expected some hiccups, but I figured the developers would smooth things out. Occasional disconnect, sketchy NA-East servers, but overall the first few weeks after release were fine. 

Instead of improving, the servers feel like they’ve gone downhill. Hit registration is inconsistent, actions get delayed, and sometimes it feels like whether you win or lose depends more on the lag than on actual skill. For a game that relies so heavily on timing and precision, this is a dealbreaker.

It’s a shame, because underneath the poor server stability is a really fun game. But unless the devs make a serious investment in fixing the infrastructure, Rematch is going to keep pushing its player base away.

Rematch has really fun, fast-paced gameplay that makes every match exciting — it’s easy to pick up but rewards teamwork and skill. My only gripe is the character customisation. Some of the options feel completely out of place for a soccer game, kind of like when Call of Duty added Beavis and Butthead. It pulls me out of the experience. Still, if you’re here for the gameplay, it’s a blast.

I tested both open betas a couple months ago. Farmed around 40 hours on each beta. I pre ordered the ultimate version coz i def had a lot of fun. So the game has a couple of issues and i'm gonna list them from my point of view.

I'm Elite and from my perspective these are the couple of takes i have for this game.

1. Terrible Netcode. With the release it seems like the game had even worse issues with netcoding than it did back in the betas, keep in mind both betas peaked around 150k players across both betas, which was phenomenal, it inted at a very very successfull game. Post release it seems like the devs didn't care enough about actually working on the netcode, major bugs appeared post release, more than it had in the beta. I get sloclap is an indie company, with few people, but you definitely should worry more about ACTUALLY fixing and putting out MORE patches than getting whatever bundles and skins they did get out.

2. Crossplay. I know, sensitive topic. Before release, crossplay was inted very strongly, that it was gonna come out with the launch of the game. Obviously, we're in 2025, a sports game needs crossplay at any cost. It made people actually buy the game on different platforms without caring enough, since crossplay was inted, they'd get to play with their friends across different platforms. Okay, i don't blame them, Technical Issues, couldn't launch crossplay, yadayada. HUGE FACTOR for the very speedy decline in player base. After the announcement that it would be coming around october, i'm guessing a lot of people ended up refunding/got tired of waiting/tired of the game or bored whatsoever.

3. Meta. I see many critics regarding ipy slides, certain mechanics that are abused due to poor netcoding, lag and so on. Whatever mechanics content creators have been trying to exploit and giving it their own name. I guess it can be frustrating to casual players/new players that get absolutely smashed by these exploits, but i'm guessing this only affects what? 5-10% of the community? Still needs to be very much adressed, as it kind of ruins the essence of the game. It's a teamplay game, where passing as announced in their launch IS CRUCIAL. With people abusing these mechanics it only makes it look WORSE and like devs don't care enough, instead embraced it, that's wrong, it's definitely not intended and needs fast adressing. Another factor for the rapidly decreasing player base btw.

4. Defending/50-50's in the box
Yes, people also do complain that the game becomes very stall at some point, where people just take 50'50's because defending relies a lot on netcoding as much as the one that actually gets to click first on the ball and perform a shot. Usually the one that performs the shot wins 60% of the time IF NOT MORE. It's not fun, it's the netcoding's fault, once again it needs adressing on this. Better defending mechanics for sure, maybe higher diving with your player, so you can actually intercept the ball, there needs to be more mechanics for aerial duels, there way too few, RMB is simply not enough, as most of the time you'll lose it.

5. Goalkeeping
Many have mentioned, it definetely needs work, if this game actually wants to stay relevant, all of the above points need adressing, some more than others, but some adjustements are definitely necessary. Goalkeeping seems way too buggy. I've seen people that complained in the early betas that the GK hitbox was way too big, they've nerfed it, apparently too much?

Anyways, i do like the game, it's my very very honest review. One more thing people have complained are blade shots, rainbow flicks into instant shots, i see no big deal in this as it can be dealt with pretty easily, plus it's a somewhat hard mechanic to execute, which definetely boosts the skill ceiling a little bit. With netcode adressing, this would be probably be even better to defend. I do recommend the game and at the same time in this state i don't. So i do have mixed feelings about it and i don't know wether i should recommend or not i guess i'll leave it at this.

Defense seems more reliable as glitches and speed bugs are not as overpowered, you are able to keep up if positioned correctly not like before where you would be left behind. No Chat box to allow communication if mic is not available.

To be reviewed  again in a few months after new patches.

With 300+ games in my library, Rematch is the worse among them all, for now at least.
Game's been out for a month now it received a lot money, so far it looks like Rematch is a cash grab the only thing the devs are adding is skins and cosmetics.
The bugs they say are fixed, still exist, we got problems from BETA coming to release, u can't tackle, the ball is glued to the opponents legs.
Still didn't add a role for a keeper when looking for a game, in high ranks those who want play keeper have to run back after every kickoff, and don't let me get started on how overpowered keepers are since BETA
Every player in every mode think they're the protagonist, never pass, never defend, while your opponents are prime barca 2010 
This part is embarrassing in my opinion, how do you have an online 5v5 game with no report button? trolls and cheaters just get away with everything and let's not talk about how toxic the voice chat is, and then they ask you to record a video and submit it into their discord or website.
The servers are just wow I get 15 - 30 ms in every game as long as I play in EU, somehow I average 100ms with 30% - 50% packet loss.
I say it's the worse cause for a while I couldn't find any game to play, and when REMATCH BETA hit it was actually good and looked promising, it had so much potential, so many modes could've been added so many things could've been fixed but yet they took my 20$ and middle fingered me.
im not good but its very fun nonetheless

It would be such a great game, if it wasn't absolutely broken right now. I have never seen any game with a Netcode this bad. 
- The ball desyncs constantly and then teleports when the game forces it to sync again
- Sudden player movements often don't track correctly, making it look like they teleport on your client
- Ball collision with players is insanely janky when it works, but usually doesn't
- Keeper just isn't reliable at all. Sometimes you get the ball 'tackled' out of you hands, other times the ball just phases through your hands
All these issues feel much worse than during the beta, and the 'fixes' are very slow to imrpove anything, if at all. But hey, at least the ingame store is now working, compared to the beta!

Edit: Somehow a recent update introduced a bug where your passes just randomly go an entirely different direction. While the mechanic isn't intuitive, at least it used to work pretty well. Used to.

Edit2: Now you character might decide to go in a random direction, disregarding your inputs! It keeps getting better!

I sincerely wanted to love this game, but I find it very difficult to find fun in it. In part, this is my own fault: I am a beta who prefers to play a support role, and who is not inclined to boldly take shots. Instead, I try to be a good keeper when in goal, try to pass all the time while in the field, and hover in a defensive position in order to cover the counterattack that I see unfolding before my eyes. I suppose there is more fun to be had in this game if you are aggressive at all times and try to score goals, and dribble as often as possible. But that is just not how I am programmed. And unfortunately for me, the game does nothing to give all players a balance of these things, or make it hard for players to hog the ball. The only way to make this game consistently fun would be to play with a full team of friends, but I have no friends who are interested in this game.

Though it is unfair to compare Rocket League to a first attempt by Rematch developer Sloclap at this type of game -- after all, Rocket League was Psyonix' second attempt at perfecting their formula, as they had already laid much of the groundwork with SARPBC --, it is hard not to pitch these two games against each other in my head. I so badly wanted Rematch to give me an alternative to Rocket League. However, it has failed to do so.

There are two huge problems with Rematch, as I see it. The first is that being a responsible player that tries to pass well, defend conscientiously, and play keeper in a sane way, is just not much fun at all. I have had a few games where all players were trying to play this way, and in those matches pulling off good passes was satisfying, but such bouts are so few and far between. The second problem is that the system for running and dribbling with the ball gives too much power to the player in possession. Rematch's design allows for people to hog the ball, it rewards leaving all that pesky defending to your teammates and simply waiting for the ball to come to you so you can try to score, and it fails to empower players like myself who try to take up the other (and equally necessary) roles on the field.

This game has made me realize more strongly just how magical Rocket League is. It is a highly technical game that relies purely on a physics system for interacting with the ball. At the end of the day the player models are just cars that cannot change shape, and cannot interact with the ball beyond hitting it in one way or another. This is not so with Rematch: here you are a football player who has the ball stick to his feet, and has access to a number of skill moves and maneuvers at the touch of a few buttons. 

This has huge implications: players who want to take the ball in Rematch and run with it, or shoot from the halfway line, can do so at any time. Contrast this with Rocket League: what that game got so right, is that the movement of your car and its interaction with the ball are extremely intuitive and fun, but pulling off any kind of specific action is very difficult. When you get into a beginners' lobby in Rocket League, everyone is simply hitting the ball every which way, and that is fine, because it's just fun to drive into the ball. Furthermore, people can be selfish all they want, because at that level they will be unlikely to score a goal from halfway across the map on a whim. The ball is always equally available to all players, and can be smashed into at will.

In Rematch, on the other hand, you will very often watch players take the ball and head straight for goal, just because they can. They will try to rainbow flick their way there about five times, and take a shot. Sometimes you will have a player who is ten times better than me and the other newbies in the lobby, and who scores like this every time. Good for them. There is no joy in watching them do it, however, because you are just idly standing by as they do their thing. In fact, I feel that for 90% of my games in Rematch, I was just shuffling about the field, trying to stand in the right place to pass or defend. This would be fine -- after all, real football is like this as well -- if not for the fact that performing these actions [i] feels boring [/i] in this game. There is no joy to the movement in Rematch. In Rocket League, just driving your car and flying is often enough to enjoy yourself. Here, it feels like a drag: the players often feel sluggish.

I know Sloclap can make a great-looking game, and one that plays great, as they have proven with Sifu. But neither element comes through in Rematch. Honestly, the actions of running and jostling for the ball don't feel good or intuitive at all to me. Considering that's what I am doing 70% of the time in this game, that's not good. The other 30%, I am watching the ball sail over my head because the keeper wanted to take a shot on goal, or seeing a teammate in the distance doing six rainbow flicks in a row, losing the ball, and allowing for a counterattack that I then fail to clean up. 

Most of the matches feel like tennis, where someone on my team shoots and misses, half of the opposing team is still in our half, their keeper throws it to them, I try and fail to catch one of the three attackers in my box who are unmarked, they miss, and our keepers throws it out to our own attackers, who are still lingering in the opponent's box. During the last game I played, my teammate was literally just standing still next to the opponents' keeper, and would spam the 'to me!' button incessantly until we would hoof him the ball. He would not move from that spot, and did zero defending. I rage-quit out of that game halfway through, and am now going to uninstall this game. Rematch, I wanted to love you, but I guess it's not meant to be.

В общем, наиграв 24ч могу сказать следующее:
- Сетевой код. Сетевой код вышел из чата. Сплошные лаги, телепортация мяча, сейв мяча за линией ворот, не регистрирует блокирование и подкаты.
- Баланс команд. Если вы решили поиграть соло - дважды подумайте, т.к ваш геймплей будет состоять из беготни и фотографирования мяча. Врятли кто-то даст вам пас, ибо большинство фанаты блулока(синей тюрьмы) и слушают не тимейтов,  а только своего внутреннего монстра. Также, в подборе зачастую попадается более сильный соперник.
- Отношение разработчиков к игре. Игра только вышла, можно сказать, что совсем сырая, но уже ввели батлпас. Апдейты выходят ну просто бесполезные, то, что описано в патчноуте, никак не соответствует действительности, мне кажется, что последние правки в сетевой код привносят только новые проблемы.
Не советую к покупке данную игру, полнейший оверпрайс для такого сырого проекта. Потенциал для дальнейшего развития есть, но разработчики идут по пути заработка.

Para empezar, el juego esta E X P L O T A D O a bugs, todo lo hecho dentro del juego esta pura y exclusivamente destinado a la mejora de gameplay para los brasileros, nosotros nos chupamos cien hectares de verga. Después tiene miles de errores de conexión, de host, de ping, de TODO. Si sos una persona que vive en las afueras de Brasil lamento informarte que no vas a ganar una pelota, no vas a podes disfrutar del juego en lo mas mínimo. Por otro lado, cada vez que sacan una actualización, no solo se dan el lujo de crear mil errores nuevos, lo divertido del juego aparentemente es buscar los nuevos bugs que hay para cada actualización porque después solo se encargan de cagarte la vida en absolutamente todos los aspectos. Jugabilidad horrible ya que el ping impide que hagas el 80% de las acciones en el juego así que conformate con divertirte metiendo pases de mierda y perdiendo casi todos los partidos de la forma mas injusta posible, pero aparte de toda esta cantidad de mierda que hay en el juego, por escándalo, lo peor que tiene y lo que jamas en mi vida vi en un juego que pase, es que por cada nueva actualización (aprox cada 1 semana), las configuraciones custom por las que te acostumbraste a jugar y te sentís cómodo, son reiniciadas de cero, como mi anterior reseña dije y a este juego le pasa lo mismo, el juego esta programado en la misma linea de código sino no se explica que cada vez que muevan algo aparezcan tres millones de bugs nuevos, no pongan un puto server en Argentina o en Chile al menos. Sin dudas una verdadera poronga, si quieren 15uds y no saben que hacer, gastenlo en timba, en putas, en alguna skin de counter o fortnite, no se en algo diferente pero por aca no es porque, en serio, es una poronga por donde lo mires, solo se van a frustrar de lo mal que anda y justamente no es un juego facil como para que todo ande mal y encima con ping, es como si quieren jugar al Rocket League con 150 de ping contra champions, es imposible aprender así, es imposible jugarlo bien y disfrutarlo. Los odio a todos, odio que hagan de un buen juego una poronga injugable, odio que sean tan verdes e idiotas de hacer un juego a medias y con la cantidad de plata que recaudo no meterle un poco de amor. Son la mierda mas mierda de este mundo y encima le chupan la pija a dos manos a los brasileros (no tengo problema con ustedes manitos, los amo pero odio a esta compañía), siganle chupando la pija que así les va a ir, en 2 años no lo juega ni tu mamá para apoyarte en los proyectos de mierda que tienen. De las peores mierdas hechas por el hombre después del anti-cheat de Valve. Ojala venga una compañía y les saque el juego y todos los proyectos que tienen asi dejan de hacer esta mierda.


Edit: Lamentablemente lo que dije se queda corto, jugue 5 partidos seguidos y la cosa esta aun peor, injugable. No se gasten en esto ni un solo peso, las acciones de nosotros vs los brazucas es infinitamente mas lento, mientras su cooldown es casi nulo el tuyo es de 5 dias habiles y para eso sumenle que muchas veces el tick rate del juego, al tener 2 de tick rate, no te detecta en la cancha, no detecta acciones, no detecta pases o atajadas, imaginate todo eso junto al lado de una persona con poco ping, sabiendo jugar con sus respectivas mecanicas, es literalmente imposible jugar y ganas, y a su vez, disfrutarlo. Как задумка - игра годная. Мне, как человеку, который не интересуется футболом вообще и никогда не был его фанатом, игра максимально зашла. Первое время прям сильно завлекла и было играть в кайф.

НО со временем в игру просто стало некомфортно играть:
1) часто крашится, выкидывает из матча и потом просто не подключается к серверу игры (все кнопки старта игры или переподключения становятся неактивными)
2) странно регаются действия:
- будучи вратарем у тебя может потеряться мяч из рук, хотя анимация и звук подбора мяча были.
- подкаты работают криво (сам не всегда можешь выбить, при этом соперник выбивает у тебя мяч даже если ты его перекинул через себя)
3) странная механика на вратаре, когда вместо того, чтобы поймать мяч, он у тебя зачем-то отбивается
4) сломанные ачивки, на которые у меня буквально ушло 140 часов, потому что непонятно как засчитываются победы, как засчитывается уровень. Самое долгое - 170 км, так как вообще неясно как оно засчитывается, магия, не иначе.

Я уж не говорю про то, что во время матча резко все телепортироваться могут или вообще произойдет резкий откат на прежние позиции.

Плохая коммуникация разрабов, вроде анонсировали патч, указали примерную дату обновления, но не выпустили его. Что с ним? Когда будет?
Да и непонятно, что будет вообще с игрой. Очень сильно просел онлайн, постоянные баги и вылеты не приносят вообще никакого удовольствия от игры.

Как итог, задумка мне очень понравилась, но честно из-за реализации и отсутствия исправлений - желания играть уже нет.

UPD: А вообще по *****, я апнул элиту и выполнил все ачивки, так что это теперь проблемы остальных)))

I'd say it's a fun game to enjoy with friends. While it's true that there isn't much new content at the moment, there's a good reason for that. As mentioned earlier, the game currently has quite a few issues, and the developers are primarily focused on fixing existing bugs and improving the netcode to ensure a smoother gameplay experience. Because of that, new content has been temporarily postponed.

Personally, I think that's a smart move—it's better to make sure the core gameplay feels solid before introducing new features. That said, until these fixes are in place, some players might find the way the game determines ball possession a bit frustrating, which is something the community has been vocal about. Still, I genuinely believe the game will feel much better after the next few patches.

Вдоволь наигравшись в открытую бетку и поиграв несколько часов в соревновательном режиме на релизе, вдруг открываются глаза и ты понимаешь, что в игре ничего не происходит. Никаких ивентов или интересных нововведений. Что не патч - фикс кривого неткода, багов и неадекватного пинга. Самое интересное что в этой игре происходит - это добавление новой косметики, но этого же мало. Для игры-сервиса это просто позор, разработчики вообще не понимают как удержать аудиторию. Вследствие онлайн упал в 9 раз. Но даже с таким количеством игроков в твоей команде рандомов всегда аутисты с синдромом нажатия "Отлично" каждый раз, когда кто то промахивается по воротам. А сами эти индивиды просто недееспособные куски мяса, клянчащие мяч и проeбывающие его в никуда. Еще бесят блюлоковские деpьмоголовые эгоисты, которые сpать хотели на тимплей - бегут на противника сломя голову, будто у них бесконечная стамина.
Говоря про механики, стоит сперва отметить, что обычные передачи и пинки довольно просто понять, что является плюсом для новичков и минусом для тех, кто ищет и использует в игре необычные фишки. Пример одной из таких фишек - можно пнуть мяч в стенку и потом с вертухи дать по отрекошеченному мячу в направление, которое никто не может прочитать. Хоть и потребуется какая-никакая практика, но все трюки выучиваются довольно быстро. В любом случае ты насмотришься этого у других за часов 10, а потом придет осознание что ты ничего нового в плане игры с мячом ты не увидишь, это потолок возможностей, которые тебе предоставляет игра.
Еще хочу сказать, что футбол сам по себе не особо интересный вид спорта, а в Рематче мы имеем его более оказуаленную, упрощенную версию, без угловых, пенальти и прочего.
По итогу имеем очень странный игросервис с минимальным количеством добавляемого контента, разрабов, которые до посинения фиксят свой кривой продукт и конченное коммьюнити футболистов. Также стоит обратить внимание на преступно малое количество интересных механик игры с мячем или просто мувмента, вы рано или поздно почувствуете однообразие трюков и фишек. Если вы любите мариноваться в деpьме и вам не жалко полторы тысячи - смело берите. Адекватным людям не рекомендую.

Как задумка - игра годная. Мне, как человеку, который не интересуется футболом вообще и никогда не был его фанатом, игра максимально зашла. Первое время прям сильно завлекла и было играть в кайф. 

НО со временем в игру просто стало некомфортно играть:
1) часто крашится, выкидывает из матча и потом просто не подключается к серверу игры (все кнопки старта игры или переподключения становятся неактивными)
2) странно регаются действия:
- будучи вратарем у тебя может потеряться мяч из рук, хотя анимация и звук подбора мяча были.
- подкаты работают криво (сам не всегда можешь выбить, при этом соперник выбивает у тебя мяч даже если ты его перекинул через себя)
3) странная механика на вратаре, когда вместо того, чтобы поймать мяч, он у тебя зачем-то отбивается
4) сломанные ачивки, на которые у меня буквально ушло 140 часов, потому что непонятно как засчитываются победы, как засчитывается уровень. Самое долгое - 170 км, так как вообще неясно как оно засчитывается, магия, не иначе.

Я уж не говорю про то, что во время матча резко все телепортироваться могут или вообще произойдет резкий откат на прежние позиции.

Плохая коммуникация разрабов, вроде анонсировали патч, указали примерную дату обновления, но не выпустили его. Что с ним? Когда будет?
Да и непонятно, что будет вообще с игрой. Очень сильно просел онлайн, постоянные баги и вылеты не приносят вообще никакого удовольствия от игры.

Как итог, задумка мне очень понравилась, но честно из-за реализации и отсутствия исправлений - желания играть уже нет.

The idea behind the game is as genius as it is simple. I'm somewhat surprised it has taken this long for a game like this to be published. However, Rematch, sadly, has a lot of issues. Its general jankiness and lack of customization options chief among them. Honestly, the game often feels more like a  relatively early beta rather than a full release. There is some fun to be had but be ready to face some frustrations with hitboxes, netcode, and the game's general jank. 

Rematch can be a really fun game, but, at the moment, it's just not there and has way too many issues that disturb the core gameplay loop. If I could I'd probably give a neutral rating, alas, this is not possible on Steam - so, for now, negative it is.

It's a fun game, but still so many issues with netcode, balancing, and toxicity. As of the last time I checked, there was no in game report system. To report someone, you need to join the discord server and give a link to their profile.

An interesting idea that unfortunately falls short in execution. The concept has potential, but the gameplay quickly becomes repetitive and lacks the depth needed to stay engaging. Playing with random people feels almost pointless, making it clear that the game works best only if you have friends to play with. Visuals and presentation are decent, but nothing truly stands out. There are moments of fun, yet too few and far between to make the experience memorable. Overall, it feels more like a missed opportunity than a must-play.

I want to start by saying that the queue times when solo playing are destroying my will to play. Every time I queue a game, no matter the playlist (ranked, 3v3, 4v4) I usually wait around 5 minutes to get in a game.

Secondly, I won't recommend this game to anyone at the current price, this feels like a freebie with all it's lacks of complexity. I can understand the early stage this game is currently in, but nothing changed from the early access and beta besides some UI changes. The lag is still here, the gameplay is the same and it just doesn't feel like a polished and released game, it still feels like the first time I hopped into it and not in a good way.

Until the developers fix this things and many other more I cannot recommend this game at all, especially paying for it. If it was free, hats down, amazing game, but at this state it's just not enough to satisfy me.

MJ Ruined this game :(

Честно, изначально отзыв был положительным с одной лишь просьбой - починить игру. "Время идёт, них*я не меняется, люди всё помнят, планета вращается", как говорится. Прошло уже много времени и всё, что мы получили за это время - это мелкие фиксы, новые скины, а также ОБЕЩАНИЯ исправить ошибки и добавить новый контент и игровые механики. Нет системы клубов? Не переживайте, мы их добавим ПОТОМ. Нет системы репортов людей за геймруин и токсичность? Не переживайте, мы сделаем это ПОТОМ. Неткод игры отвратителен и работает так, как ему хочется? Не переживайте, мы починим его ПОТОМ. Игроки на ПК до сих пор страдают из-за сверх-чувствительной сенсы на ПКМ, F и X? Мы добавим на это настройку, но ПОТОМ. А пока держите новые набор с носками, шортами, кросовками и тегом за 1000 донатной валюты. Игра существует уже приличное количество времени и за всё время улучшений касательно игрового опыта - минимум.

Я пришёл в эту игру с надеждой на то, что она сможет стать мне сессионкой, в которую можно залипнуть с друзьями, заменив тем самым доту. Но чем больше я в рематч играю, тем больше понимаю, что да, дота - тот ещё шлак, который уже много лет не меняется. Но он хотя бы с точки зрения оптимазации, неткода и игровых механик работает нормально, чёрт возьми. Если ты проигрываешь или у тебя что-то не получается, причина может быть где угодно, но не в кривости игры. Про рематч я такого сказать не смогу.

С болью в сердце осознаю для себя, что возложил на игру слишком большие надежды. Буду верить, что когда-нибудь ПОТОМ игра станет в адекватном смысле играбельной, а пока это просто платный бетатест, где разрабы тестят внутриигровой магазин, потому что он - единственный игровой сегмент, который регулярно обновляется и улучшается.

Eu realmente pensei se valeria a pena entrar em detalhes do motivo de eu não recomendar esse jogo, mas acho que é válido eu dar meus pontos aqui do motivo de eu achar esse jogo horrível e uma péssima compra. Se você não gosta de textões nem continue lendo apartir daqui.

Eu me empolguei bastante com esse jogo quando ele foi anunciado, as mecânicas diferentes, a gameplay rápida e o estilo de jogo me cativaram, e acho que foi esse hype que fez eu não desistir dele por quase 500 horas desde o seu lançamento. Mas chegou num ponto que esse hype morreu e oque restou foi apenas uma esperança que esse game tinha algum ponto positivo que fizesse valer a pena continuar investindo tempo nele, mas os pontos negativos que eu vou listar agora simplesmente ofuscam (ou destroem por completo) os pontos positivos desse game:

- JOGO SEM MATCHMAKING:
Sinceramente o sistema de rank desse jogo ta aqui só pra cumprir requisito de um jogo """competitivo""", por mais que exista ranqueadas e um sistema de ranks/elos ele é completamente inútil, pois o jogo não te coloca com pessoas com rank, nível ou até mesmo tempo de jogo igual o seu. Eu já estava no rank Elite (o mais alto que da pra alcançar) nas duas ranqueadas que tem no jogo, que são os modos 3v3 e 5v5, e diversas vezes eu cai com gente tanto na minha equipe quanto na equipe adversária com ranks claramente inferiores ao meu, oque torna as partidas completamente desbalanceadas e nem um pouco divertidas, para ambos os lados, pois quem ta começando não consegue fazer nada, pois não consegue reagir ao adversário que já ta em um rank elevado, e quem joga a mais tempo cai com iniciante no próprio time. Oque gera uma partida completamente caótica em que nenhuma jogada funciona direito e a maioria dos gols que sai são ou por pura sorte ou porque alguém conseguiu fazer uma jogada solo e fazer um gol por conta própria, oque leva para meu próximo ponto negativo.

- JOGO IMPOSSÍVEL DE SE JOGAR SEM ESTAR EM UMA EQUIPE FECHADA:
Você pode até tentar jogar com pessoas aleatórias, eu mesmo joguei por muito tempo só com aleatórios, porém é uma experiência horrível, pois diferente de vários jogos competitivos que existem no mercado, que por mais que você esteja num time a habilidade individual de cada um faz diferença na partida, mesmo não tendo uma comunicação se todo mundo jogar bem e fizer sua parte da pra sua equipe ganhar. Mas isso não existe aqui no Rematch, o estilo de game que ele é exige comunicação, sincronia, você pode ser literalmente o melhor jogador do mundo desse jogo, se você cair num time com quatro aleatórios, onde o rank de ninguém é igual um com o outro, e pra piorar ninguém ta com a call ligada pra tentar montar jogadas você não vai conseguir fazer nada. Diversas vezes eu perdi uma partida no 5v5, e principalmente no 3v3, sem nem conseguir tocar na bola, pois ninguém do meu time passou pra mim, ou conseguiram fazer um passe direito, oque gerava num contra ataque, posteriormente ao fim da partida, literalmente perdendo sem conseguir nem sequer tido a chance de fazer alguma coisa, aí eu te pergunto, isso é justo e divertido aonde? Você pode até dizer que é só arranjar um time, mas não é dever do jogo obrigar o jogador encontrar amigos pra simplesmente JOGAR, ele tem que ser um jogo capaz de divertir e ser justo mesmo pra quem joga sozinho, fora que ele é pago, não da pra simplesmente falar para seus amigos comprarem pra todo mundo jogar junto, oque acaba forçando a pessoa entrar na comunidade e encontrar jogadores dentro dela pra montar um time, mas isso leva justamente pra meu próximo ponto negativo.

- COMUNIDADE TÓXICA E ALTA PRESENÇA DE TROLLS:
Não querendo generalizar, fiz amigos legais jogando esse jogo, mas a maioria dos jogadores que jogam isso aqui saíram direto do Blue Lock e acham que são os protagonista da vida dela, e se acham pra caramba só por saberem jogar um joguinho com mecânicas simples e que nem fazer uma ranqueada descente consegue fazer, e quando levam apenas um gol já quitam da partida, deixando o seu time que já tava ruim por estar cheio de gente com habilidades diferentes juntas agora pior ainda por ter menos um jogador. Atitudes assim existem desde o primeiro beta, porém a Sloclap se finge de cega, demorou muito pra sequer ter uma """punição""" pra quem quita das partidas, oque nem sequer deve se chamar de punição, pelo menos pra mim esperar só três minutos no lobby antes de puxar outra partida não é punição. Claramente ela de maneira intencional escolhe não fazer nada pois sabe que com a baixa quantidade de jogadores que tem atualmente, se eles começarem a ficar horas em punição por quitarem das partidas será ainda mais dificil e demorado achar jogadores para começar outras partidas, assim afetando aqueles que apenas querem jogar o jogo na moral.

- QUANTIDADE ABSURDA DE GLITCHS E BUGS:
Você percebe que o game é bom quando a maioria das "mecânicas" dele se consiste em glitchs que os jogadores descobrem, fora os bugs que apenas atrapalham o jogo, como por exemplo o bug do seu personagem perder a fisica e não conseguir mais interagir com a bola, e quase sempre acontece com o cara que ta como goleiro, assim tornando impossível ele defender um chute, assim perdendo uma partida única e exclusivamente por culpa do jogo, bugs que existem desde o beta e que a Sloclap simplesmente não corrige, e você tem que rezar pra eles não acontecerem com você.

- PÉSSIMO PORTE TANTO PRA CONTROLE QUANTO PRA TECLADO E MOUSE:
Esse aqui é mais pessoal, pois falar que jogar no controle ou no teclado é mais fácil ou mais dificil vai completamente da pessoa, mas no MEU ponto de vista, é simplesmente muito ruim usar a mecânica de driblar no teclado e mouse, claramente ela foi feita pensando na liberdade que o analógico da, eu joguei desde sempre no teclado apenas, e é tão desconfortante driblar no teclado que chega a dar dores no meu pulso, por causa da maneira extremamente desconfortável que você deixar seus dedos e pela velocidade que você tem que apertar os botões em uma determinada ordem. Ao mesmo tempo o controle é inferior quando o assunto é fazer funções básicas, coisas que no teclado é apenas uma tecla, no controle você tem que apertar duas ou até mesmo três, fora a falta de precisão na hora de mirar o chute e colocar efeito na bola, coisa essa que é infinitamente mais fácil e confortável com o mouse. No fim parece que não importa aonde você jogue, vai ter algo ruim na gameplay, no teclado sendo o drible e no controle sendo a precisão da mira.

- FALTA ABSURDA DE CONTEÚDO PRA JUSTIFICAR ELE SER PAGO:
Acho que de todos os pontos esse é o mais negativo de todos, pois mexe diretamente no financeiro da pessoa, quase 100 reais em um jogo com todos esses pontos negativos, e que já faz quase um ano de lançamento e que ainda mantém os mesmos modos de jogo desde o beta, tendo apenas tido dois modos de jogos temporários diferentes, aonde o primeiro foi simplesmente ruim e que ninguém jogou, e o outro do 1v1 legal, mas novamente muito desbalanceado, pois era só acertar UM roubo de bola que o adversário ficava stunado dando completamente liberdade para o outro marcar. Mas por serem modos temporários quando eles acabavam o jogo voltavam apenas para as mesmas partidas ranqueadas 3v3 ou 5v5, aonde você caia com as mesmas pessoas, pois o jogo não tem jogador praticamente, aonde ninguém ta se comunicando, ninguém tem o mesmo rank, você tem que lidar com possíveis bugs, enfim, uma junção de tudo que eu listei e comentei até agora. Existem MUITOS jogos de graça no mercado, jogos bons, lotados de conteúdo, Where Winds Meet por exemplo, praticamente um Elden Ring da vida, completamente gratuito.

Enfim, acho que deu pra entender o motivo de eu ter dado uma avaliação negativa pra esse jogo e agora estar de vez desistindo dele. Ele só vale a pena se você estiver jogando com amigos e sem intenção alguma de ser bom e de ganhar, fora isso vá jogar outra coisa, não gaste seu dinheiro com Rematch.

Déconseillé - Jeu cassé, toxique, frustrant
Après plusieurs heures de jeu, je ne peux que vous déconseiller Rematch, à moins que vous aimiez les bugs, la frustration et la toxicité.
Bugs en pagaille : collisions incohérentes, joueurs qui se téléportent ou passent à travers le ballon. Défendre devient un calvaire, surtout sur les reprises de volée où le jeu bug et vous encaissez un but gratuit.
Ranked catastrophique : système de points absurde : +20 quand vous gagnez, +20 quand vous perdez. Quel est l’intérêt d’un mode compétitif dans ces conditions ? Aucune progression cohérente.
Rollback et latence : les actions ne sont pas synchronisées, vous croyez avoir fait une action… puis le jeu "rollback" et c’est l’inverse qui se produit.
Communauté toxique : insultes permanentes, spam de chat rapide à chaque action. L’ambiance est plus proche d’une arène de trolls que d’un jeu compétitif.
Bref, un potentiel gâché par un manque flagrant de finitions et une communauté qui vous donne envie de désinstaller le jeu au bout de quelques parties.

Attendez des mises à jour majeures ou passez votre chemin.

O jogo está muito bom no momento, mas tenho algumas observações:

Matchmaking: as partidas competitivas estão bastante desbalanceadas. Jogadores de rank inicial acabam enfrentando adversários de níveis muito superiores, o que prejudica a experiência.

Jogadores tóxicos/trolls: infelizmente não há como evitar, e atualmente não existe uma forma eficiente de reportá-los. Eles não sofrem punições nem têm sua integridade reduzida ao prejudicar propositalmente o jogo.

Hackers: pessoalmente, nunca encontrei nenhum, apesar de já ter visto alguns clipes mostrando casos.

No geral, o jogo está ótimo, mas acredito que esses pontos merecem atenção para melhorar ainda mais a experiência competitiva.

I love this game, this is absolutely one of the best sports games made in a long time and I had so much fun... at the beginning. Now, because of the priority system, players have figured out all you have to do it blast it to the 18 yard line and defenders can't do literally anything because you can't intercept it with a header and the dive button does not go high enough, so every game just turns into a penalty shootout eventually. That's also ignoring the ball tap and return that makes the ball teleport to the dribbler, or the horrible rollback and lag, or the fact the ball just ignores the keeper, or the animations lock you into a horrible action that you didn't intend and you can't do anything for 3 seconds. The optimal way to play this game is to AFK in the penalty box, wait until your team or the enemy hits it to your keeper, and then you have a penalty shootout while this happens over and over. 

This could be forgivable as just a bad meta that can be fixed, but this game also has numerous issues like horrible netcode, random glitches, the random behavior of the goalkeeper of sometimes having complete magnet hands and sometimes just falling over like a scared cat while the ball goes right through their hands. 

I know the team creating this is small compared to big companies and they have limited resources to quickly turnover fixes for the problems but, frankly this game was released too early and the because of these issues the meta of the game is absolutely horrible and revolves around everyone trying to exploit every issue. And that's sad, because when players don't exploit these issues and they play it like real soccer, it is absolutely the most fun I've ever had in a sports game, and games in general. But Sloclap really has to buckle down and resolve these issues because especially in 5v5, if you're not the keeper or the cherry picker, you're not doing anything because you can't defend and you can't make plays because the best course of action is just blasting it from the keeper.

I really hope they fix this, because I LOVE this game. But until they fix these issues, I'm taking a break, because the game is not enjoyable at all in its current state, and I'm worried I'll never return because the player base will be gone before they fix the issues in the game as it is. It actually pains me to leave a negative review because I have had some of the most fun I've ever had in this game, but it just isn't there.

Edit: Literally every patch they fix one thing and introduce 3 far worse problems. Do you not playtest at all or what? The game was in the best state since release last patch and then sloclap decides "oh the ippy slide is a problem", which it is, but they removed it in the last patch and now goalies can't dive, defenders can't header, and the volley system that they fixed breaks once again. This game is a perfect example of why indie multiplayer games fail always, because no one ever wants to test the product before they release the 50 changes they have in a patch. The game was in the best state yet despite a lot of problems but because reddit complained about ippy slide and teleporting to the ball (which was a problem but not as pressing), now the game is back where it was. Please stop doing agile the way you're doing it, hotfix the major issues and see how the game changes because the game has completely changed every patch and 90% of it is for the worse.

Unfortunately after over 100 hours i cant recommend this game. The devs decided that they wanted a quick 15 million dollars rather than dethroning rocket league and getting 150 million dollars. Its almost as if they've never actually played a competitive video game before. Imagine releasing something you dare to call "ranked" without a report system. Imagine after release and "fixes" playing a ranked game where your goalie suddenly isn't able to touch the ball in front of him and there's no way for him to fix it other than quit your ranked game. As someone who has played Absolver and Sifu, all i can say is i'm disappointed. There update schedule is an absolute joke. They were more worried about letting players set up their own controller configurations (something players did with outside programs day 1) rather than fixes the abhorrent state of their net code. If you want a fun competitive game do not come here, instead you'll find people abusing exploits to win, people quitting without a real penalty, and devs who dont care. *Revision* Its only gotten worse after another 30 hours. You cant even turn while running in this game anymore. Update* 200 hours in still no report button, no penaltiess for leaving ranked games, a max of 4k players online with an average around 2k, game is dead. I am officially uninstalling it after giving it an additional 250 hours. Every single patch has made the game worse and now we have a rotten piece of trash more concerned with marketing more stupid PUMA GEAR or RONALDINHO special clothes (WAY TO HAVE NO CLUE WHAT YOUR BASE ACTUALLY WANTS). The cherry on top was them reducing the amount of experience needed to get green tokens (at the same time increasing the prince of more than half of the items to 2 tokens to redeem) creating the illusion of an easier pass while retaining the same slow crawl its always been. I can only imagine the creators of Absolver and Sifu must have been gutted before producing this steaming pile crap.

I’ve grinded my way up to Elite, but honestly, it feels completely pointless. The matchmaking is a total mess  half the time I get teammates who play like absolute monsters, the other half I get stuck with people who are basically Bronze. There’s no middle ground, no fair matches, just extremes every single game.

It doesn’t matter that I’m Elite, because the rank doesn’t actually reflect the skill of the lobby. I can destroy in one game because my teammates carry, and then get completely stomped in the next because I’m forced to babysit players who shouldn’t even be close to my rank.

Elite is supposed to mean something, but in this game it’s just a random label slapped on you while matchmaking throws dice to decide whether you’re allowed to win or not. Right now, ranked is pure chaos and a waste of time.

[h1]REVIEW SUMMARY[/h1]
Good game, great potential. The game feels/plays like an early access title; If you buy it, expect early access, not full release. From the perspective of a beta tester and developer, I am able to look past a lot of the issues as they are fixable and will need time to level things out.

[h1]DETAILED REVIEW:[/h1]
[h2]The Good:[/h2]
[b]1)[/b] You can have a lot of fine control over the ball; Same developers from Sifu, so you can imagine the feel probably.
[b]2)[/b] The modifier button (R1/RB) feels nice, and you can do some really deceptive stuff, especially with curve-balls.
[b]3)[/b] There is quite a bit of control for defense (dribble, diving, sliding/tackle, lobbing)
[b]4)[/b] When passing, you can lob (2 strengths) or shoot if you want more distance or curve
[b]5)[/b] When the ball goes out of bounds, it instead will bounce off an invisible wall instead of exiting the field. This can be used for some really nice moves
[b]6)[/b] Teamwork goes a long way: PASS THE FREAKING BALL!!! This is in the good instead of bad because its good for game-play, but the players just try to solo everything and no-one really want to work together. Stop trying to be the main character! You can bounce off the walls for deceptive passes and goals.

[h2]The Bad:[/h2]
[b]1)[/b] KB+M Controls are ATROCIOUS; Controls change based position (space is dive as goal keeper, Q as anyone else)
     [b]1.1)[/b] No modifier key on KB+M, creating some really weird control schemes
     [b]1.2)[/b] Curve shots are done using the look on instead of movement, creating some really awkward moments.
[b]2)[/b] Heavy desync; the net-code definitely needs some work.
     [b]2.1)[/b] If someone tries to steal the ball, sometimes it works sometimes it don't; the net-code seems to prioritizes the client attached to the ball, so if the attached client doesn't see the ball get stolen, it can teleport back into their control. This seems to be caused by latency + poor lag compensation.
[b]3)[/b] The game is in more of a early-access state, but the game page does not reflect this in any way! Expect an unfinished product as they are still working on the game and DO keep in mind the developers have not abandoned the game, so it will get better! This point can be ignored if the update the page to early access.

This is a tough review to write because this game has so much going for it but also so much going against it.  

To give a little bit of background, I am a football (soccer) fanatic.  I watch a lot of it, I love playing it, I love reading about it, and I love playing videogames or watching movies about it. I have played all generations of football games.  Dating back to International Superstar Soccer on the SNES all the way to FIFA 202X.  However, ever since 2018, FIFA (for better or worse, mostly worse) has basically been the only game in town.  And since then the game has begun to feel samey.  Every new iteration brings some improvements, but whenever you buy a new version of FIFA, what you're paying for is the most up to date rosters for you to dream winning the league with your favorite team.  With it being a sim, it's a fun game in its own right but it truly does not feel like a football game. Enter Rematch. 

# the good

There really is no game that feels quite like it except, unsurprisingly, Rocket League.  This game brings back those same, addicting, stressful, yet elevating feelings you get when you're playing football.  When you play the non ranked 3v3/4v4/5v5, it genuinely feels like those times growing up where a game was formed with your classmates at recess one random Tuesday afternoon.  When you score a winning goal, you feel that same sense of euphoria as when you would have done it IRL.  When you're at GK, you feel the same weight of the world on your shoulders as when your team had you be GK IRL. I could tell you that I, for the most part, stay away from competitive multiplayer gaming.  I stick to single player or co-op 99% of the time, and a competitive multiplayer game has to be something special to pry me away from the others.  Rematch is that something special.  

# And now for the bad.  

Rematch suffers from so many negatives, it hurts to think about them.  For starters God help you if you don't have a group of friends who can play with you.  Solo Queuing is an absolute nightmare.  You will be placed with teams of people who either don't know what they're doing,  believe they're Cristiano Ronaldo and don't realize that a big part of what made him good was he was all over the pitch, tracked back a lot, and didn't just hang out in the opposition box.  You'll also get players who refuse (bc they're too chickenshit to) be GK.  sometimes all three at the same time. 

There are some genuinely baffling bugs/netcode issues in this game.  I can count so many times when I've seen my GK catch the ball but it still registers a goal for the other team.  I've seen weird ball physics where the ball just slingshots around on its own.  Many other times when you'll be queued up for the match to begin, it will kick you out, or you're unable to touch the ball for some reason.  One guy loaded into the game with no head and no clothes lmao.  Ranked mode doesn't work as you would think.  Sometimes you could be given a team of bronzes and you're put up against teams of elite level players.  

Also Crossplay was promised but the developers, SLOCLAP, were unable to deliver come release time.  They are very active in the community and release about one communique every two weeks so we are aware they are still working on crossplay.  But it truly was disheartening when I had several friends queued up to play only for us to learn that we wouldn't be able to play together.  

The neutral: The control scheme takes some getting used to.  I still have some frustrating moments where I pointed the mouse in a direction but because my movement was too jerky, my player decided to pass it the wrong way and we lose the ball.  But after while you get good at it. The gameplay is still new and fun an fresh however.  

# Overall
The game is fantastic.  I've already sunk 87 hours into the game and I don't expect that to stop anytime soon. This game has the potential to be a FIFA killer.  In my eyes it already has.  And if they can just get rid of these bugs and netcode, this game can reach GOAT status, bc it's already GOTY for me.

Este juego es lo que siempre he soñado para un juego de fútbol. Los partidos son rápidos, desafiantes y adictivos. Sin mejoras ni desventajas entre tú y otros jugadores, solo sois tú y tu habilidad. Se siente muy bien el balón en los pies y los chutes. Mecánicamente es excelso, nada que no esperase de los creadores de Sifu, uno de mis juegos favoritos.

Sin embargo el problema viene con todo lo demás.

La interfaz y los menús se sienten como si fuera un juego free to play, lo cual no tendría problema si fuera eso precisamente, un juego free to play, pero el juego cuesta 20 euros. 

El sistema de monetización también es muy agresivo, recuerda a muchos free to play también. Aunque se trata de solo de elementos cosméticos que no afectan a la jugabilidad, se siente muy predatorio.

En cuanto a modos de juego está muy vacío. No tiene modo cooperativo local ni de un jugador, solo un par de tutoriales de práctica que puedes terminar en 10 minutos, poco más, se siente como un juego a medio terminar en ese aspecto.

Echo en falta un sistema más complejo de comunicación, es fútbol, es importante comunicarse en el campo. Así también una opción para silenciar los comentarios de los demás compañeros de equipo si resultan molestos.

NO EXISTE NINGÚN TIPO DE PENALIZACIÓN POR ABANDONAR UN PARTIDO. Esto es lo peor, últimamente raro es el caso en el que acabe con los mismos compañeros de juego que con los que empiezo un partido. Hay muchas personas de la comunidad que se está creando que quieren jugar, asociarse y entenderse en el campo, pero basta con un jugador con mala actitud que enturbia esta intención. Nada raro en un juego cooperativo online pero el poder abandonar un partido sin ningún tipo de consecuencia no ayuda. Tampoco se puede reportar mal comportamiento. Un desastre.

Sinceramente creo que debería haber una moderación en cuanto a la personalización de personajes, ya que veo muy frecuentemente conjuntos haciendo alusiones r*cistas o incluso f*scistas, que evidentemente buscan provocación e incitación al odio.

Mecánicamente poco tocaría del juego, es fantástico y tiene mucho potencial. Pero el margen de mejora en TODO lo demás es amplio, hasta entonces, no lo puedo recomendar.
